name: Jim Banks, Chairman
subject: Have you heard the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, As our team’s email yesterday mentioned, President Trump will be visiting the Southern border tomorrow, and he _**personally**_ asked me to join him! Under the Biden administration’s **[HORRENDOUS](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=c9972d832f944ae0b7b340acf08d7fb0&_e=U9HOUocCXCSq30cJCHha1H09TDd0Oh0i1YDXyraIa6H9ihWeoVJhdBQnAanMwYJMtqTVVjkz3xHbtM8iDKhAYUWaeuIu2oRexyDMezHSlWpIB2yeaJTsd-Nh82mPsPk5mvn4nOPmEHHCsSnT_v-YCHCcnaGiPYVRJMdMv3lwoTpRTXFsQgeHbu8zxlnVlxIP-2wLUr7Kh0vISqUFzshMkQCAvWbBFOvu6YI5RibotkfhdQAI121iW2A4cF9cIBwgP7CrReqinqlyGgwQk2wCJ3dmy6KmpN_Jhnarx5nEk1wXSmozdvaIFFwaRdcNUIgJ51b9L2xJU44C3Tm0POzWHm4oty1dgBE8ZWIz2ZuLgTTpvR4L50QYgad_3QRcOIrjci-u5896IaO8RQeOSLhdJhmhjXbiVJBQkfva1tGH9YrnAAucHPCdO10z-z5cPsMbNtZo9dD7BOBQ3n7nBnpw1pc8tOLZ7PvFmRlCoOt0sCk%3D)** open border policies, illegal immigrants have been crossing the Southern border in **RECORD** amounts and my team is already on the ground reporting back that it’s worse than we thought. Even more unbelievable, instead of visiting the border, the Democrats want to incentivize illegal immigration even further by giving out COVID vaccines to those illegally entering our country. _**Don’t they realize their incentivizing illegal immigration?**_ Of course not. Democrats care more about their radical agenda than actually doing what’s best for the American people. name: John Burke
subject: California tops the nation in homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
California’s homeless population is out of control, but Kevin Faulconer has a plan to fix it. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/6d5df2846e35463dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, More people are homeless in California than anywhere else in America — 161,000 and counting. Gavin Newson has proven that he doesn’t have what it takes to make the tough choices to fix this crisis. He’s denying reality, refusing to address the real problem, and throwing taxpayer money at it and just hoping for the best. **As Mayor of San Diego, Kevin Faulconer compassionately and firmly moved people indoors. We reduced outdoor homelessness by 12 percent, and decreased tent encampments by 80 percent.** He believes that if you condone people living on the streets, you’re condemning them to die on the streets. That’s why he has a plan to get people on the streets indoors and get them the help they need to get back on their feet. We need to base our plans in reality. We can’t ignore mental health issues and drug addiction among the homeless. We have to face these problems, and it starts by getting them off the streets and into shelters. **We need to help our homeless, and we need to allow all Californians to have their public space back. Tent cities have never been the answer, and they are not the answer now. ** Kevin cleaned up tent camps in San Diego, and he’s ready to do it across the Golden State. **[CLICK HERE for more info about Kevin’s plan to kindly and compassionately clean up homelessness in California.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/8adf64d6b7dca790c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** -John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/943b2a170472b865c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/eb33b410ec16e120c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/9b5b6a70d7f55e8ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/385e4b50ec5493ca/afa7a048740df4e3c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
---|---|---|---

| Hi, it's Erin with Team Jacobs.

We are just 24 hours away from our end-of-the-quarter fundraising deadline, and **_Chris asked me to reach out to you personally and see if you could help us reach our goal._**

Right now, **_Chris is at our southern border with President Trump fighting for the security of our nation. _**

He’s exposing Biden and Harris’ failed policies that have put an open sign on our southern border for criminals, cartels, and illicit drugs.

**_I am going to be getting on a call with Chris tomorrow at NOON to update him about our fundraising efforts, and I will be giving him a list of his most trusted supporters who have his back in this fight_ – ****will I be able to give him your name?**

| Peter, _**First and foremost, thank you.**_ Thank you for carrying the fire of freedom in your heart, and stepping up for the cause of liberty when so many others have chosen to ignore the mounting threats to our Republic. With YOUR help, and the support of conservative champions like President Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Crime needs to be stopped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Punish the criminals |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=04d41b8c21&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I'm tired of Biden using the crises HE CREATES to take away our rights.

His dementia is becoming dangerous. He is making our lives worse, every single day!

It's time the Republicans in Congress started fighting him- and I will do it when I get to Congress!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3bdfe24592&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by worthless Democrat Darren Soto, who voted to go easy on criminals and take away guns from law abiding Americans. **

We HAVE to defeat him!

Biden can't stop himself. He refuses stubbornly to prosecute criminals, instead choosing to go after law-abiding citizens who arm themselves against the criminals Biden is allying himself with.

Between his "crime strategy" and his open border policies, Joe Biden is the criminal's best friend!

_President Biden in remarks Wednesday said his crime prevention strategy would focus on strengthening background checks, banning assault weapons and high-capacity magazines, and boosting community policing.

Biden met with state and local leaders and law enforcement officials ahead of his remarks to talk crime prevention strategy, amid a surge in violence in cities across the U.S.

Both Biden and Attorney General Merrick Garland, who spoke before him, pointed to a historic rise in crime in the summertime, and said that rise "may be more pronounced" as the nation comes out of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**The White House has insisted curbing gun violence is key to tamping down a "staggering" surge of crime across the U.S. **

"Talk to most responsible gun owners they'll tell you there's no possible justification for having 100 rounds in a magazine," Biden said. _

This demented fool actually thinks if you take ammo away from lawful gun owners, it will stop crime. He's either a liar, a fool, or both.

**_I think he's both. _**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ad4d763de0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**We need to do better than this! One plan I like is to re-fund the police, with 100,000 more police on the streets this year. FOX News reports:**__

_Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., on Wednesday introduced legislation to hire 100,000 new police officers across the U.S. and boost optimism among police and communities.

The bill would provide federal grants to locales to boost new police hires; increase penalties for assaulting federal officers by 50%; develop programs to protect the private information judges, prosecutors, and law enforcement officials; extend concealed carry rights to federal judges and prosecutors; increase service programs for federal officers; and more.

"It's absolutely vital that we keep American families safe. That is the bottom line, and right now, too many Americans aren't. Why aren't they? Because ... violent crime is up by over 30% in cities across the country," Hawley said Wednesday on "America's Newsroom" "Unfortunately, that includes my home state of Missouri. _We need more cops. We shouldn't be defunding the police. We should be supporting them_."_

I'll vote for that! More cops please, and let us keep our guns and ammo!

Biden gets everything wrong. He thinks we should support criminals and lawbreakers and punish the citizens. I think the opposite.

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, making America safe again. I will bring Florida's successes to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _I am the guy he's scared of, he wants NO part of seeing me again because our district is trending Red- like our state!

[This is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e2b5c1c40d&e=afa21b7626)_

I have a goal I must meet by Wednesday at midnight. I need to raise $40,000 but I'm still $4900 short. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cf996367c9&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me make America safe again!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bb663f95ad&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=16d1969ac6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2e3d47daba&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5c4cb8c466&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Nancy KNOWS Ilhan is a Terrorist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and AOC hate our
nation - they hate everything that we stand for. Nancy Pelosi is
allowing them to poison our country from inside the halls of
Congress.
I'M SICK OF IT.
I'm Congressman Andy Biggs, Chairman of the
House Freedom Caucus, and a principled conservative from Arizona.
I refuse to be quiet. I refuse to let these women compare the
United States to terrorists. Will you stand with me as I fight
back against those in Congress who support terrorism and violence
more than peace and the rule of law?

Ilhan Omar compared the United States to
the Taliban, a terrorist organization that publicly stoned women.

AOC cheered for protestors holding signs
that said, "Punch that cop," while police were being pummeled
night after night by so-called peaceful protestors.

Rashida Tlaib was pictured smiling with a
Hezbollah terrorist after she was sworn into Congress in 2019.

I don't care what names the DC media throws
at me. I'm not going to sit idly by while The Squad attempts to
destroy us.
I'm going to fight, and I'm going to win.
Will you stand with me?
Someone needs to stand up, and clearly, Nancy
Pelosi is too scared to act like a leader. I will call out those
who perpetuate destructive lies about our great nation. I will
condemn the hate and vitriolic statements of the Left. I will
always stand for freedom and liberty.
If you want to join me, please make your most
generous donation today. I will be honored to have your support.
God bless you and God bless America,

Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus

name: Greg Abbott
subject: President Trump is in Texas TODAY!! 📆
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
| | | | | | **FROM THE DESK OF GOVERNOR GREG ABBOTT**
Dear Peter,

Today, President Trump will visit the border to get a firsthand look at the CRISIS created by President Biden's dangerous open-border policies.

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Just need a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Peter,
I'll keep my message to you brief today.
Speaking out against the narrative of the woke Left has me in the crosshairs of every America-Last institution in the country.
When I recently spoke out against the destructive Critical Race Theory - aka, anti-White racism - that is sowing division in the United States Military, they were quick to try to target me again.
But it's not just me they're after. They're trying to erase the entire America First movement!
We Need to Fight Back: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-1-min-eoq2](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CPmDG_V89gVeAFPCmhf_G6mprpUEtCFfzhzyWTyzVWvqmWJMpJpQaKG1btZAlDBmSDj8z-87sJ-LCCL-U9MdrRIIJahx9KHmteAfMOU6Hq-0VrPpL1GZCBb6HulmcP19qPQldXYHDRfkb1OqGZbqWbTewf0jwbp-izwN4qxcxTvunttf0SLoqw==&c=PKg7nKGoPyPYjaKIeWFL6PjOXGuT_oSnequ9ZawR22DpHG3vX3ru6w==&ch=j5mnVpPKjQQMfi4QYBT0kjgP3LYkitQ9R87UdJJRb0ci45MwAC6YpA==)
Coming up on Wednesday is a fundraising deadline where our movement will have the chance to show that it's too powerful to be Cancelled by our detractors.
We need to send a strong statement - can I count on you to show that the Silent Majority isn't about to bow down?
Chip in for the Deadline: [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-1-min-eoq2](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CPmDG_V89gVeAFPCmhf_G6mprpUEtCFfzhzyWTyzVWvqmWJMpJpQaKG1btZAlDBmSDj8z-87sJ-LCCL-U9MdrRIIJahx9KHmteAfMOU6Hq-0VrPpL1GZCBb6HulmcP19qPQldXYHDRfkb1OqGZbqWbTewf0jwbp-izwN4qxcxTvunttf0SLoqw==&c=PKg7nKGoPyPYjaKIeWFL6PjOXGuT_oSnequ9ZawR22DpHG3vX3ru6w==&ch=j5mnVpPKjQQMfi4QYBT0kjgP3LYkitQ9R87UdJJRb0ci45MwAC6YpA==)
Thanks for rushing in your support,
-Matt Gaetz
Sent from my iPhone.

When I recently spoke out against the destructive Critical Race Theory - aka, anti-White racism - that is sowing division in the United States Military, they were quick to try to target me again. But it's not just me they're after. They're trying to erase the entire America First movement! We Need to Fight Back: == Coming up on Wednesday is a fundraising deadline where our movement will have the chance to show that it's too powerful to be Cancelled by our detractors. We need to send a strong statement - can I count on you to show that the Silent Majority isn't about to bow down? We need to hold the far-left accountable for this ridiculous attempt to socialize America and destroy our great nation. Whether it's defunding the police or opening our borders, the far-left have the wrong plan for America, which is why we have to stand strong against them. body:
Republicans only need to pick up a handful of seats to win back control of the House, and we need your help to do it. _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osDXDLcdN5)****_

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)
---

Peter,

Gas is up. Wheat is up. The price of corn, coal and lumber are also up.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)
**China** is cracking down on freedom of expression & liberty in Hong Kong. The United States is back in the World Health Organization - **the UN** continues to help cover up the origins of the COVID-19 virus. Violence in the Middle East is on the rise.

And Nancy Pelosi wants to spend her time issuing fines to Republicans who don't wear face masks on the House floor, rather than create a commission to discover whether or not COVID-19 was a man-made virus which escaped from a Chinese lab.

I remember 1979 and I don't want to relive it. _**Do you?**_

| _**SIGN THE PETITION

[GIVE DEMOCRATS THE BOOT
HELP US WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)** _

SIGNATURE REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[** HELP US WIN BACK THE HOUSE ➞
ADD YOUR NAME**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)

---

Since Democrats took total control of Washington in January:
1. **Biden and Pelosi have spent $6 trillion**
2. Proposed another $6 trillion in spending
3. Proposed higher taxes
4. **Rising gas prices**
5\. Illegal immigrants get a free trip to the U.S. courtesy of American taxpayers!
[**We need you to sign onto our petition today**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)letting us know you're as committed as we are to winning back the House for Republicans in next year's elections.

After so much winning during the Trump years, **what I'm seeing now is just downright sad**.

**[We need 1,000 conservatives to sign this petition every day from now through June 30th. Sign the petition today to stop Joe Biden and Radical Nancy Pelosi from ruining our country](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)**.

For liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58346196:sDXDLcdN5:m:1:2247059263:1CEA535870AFCABA031E51B6855CD514:r)
Jim Jordan

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: I noticed you haven’t been opening these emails lately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
If you read one email, make it this one | | |
---
Hi there, I noticed you haven’t been opening these emails lately, so I wanted to personally reach out. I get it, emails can be overwhelming. And believe me, I’d rather not have to send them. My focus continues to be fighting for hard-working families like yours in the Senate. But frankly, we’re in a tough spot heading into our biggest deadline to date. In less than 24 hours, our campaign will report our fundraising numbers to the FEC -- numbers that will be public for anyone to see. Mitch McConnell and corporate special interests are already making me their top target for taking back the Senate. **Mike Pence even came to New Hampshire earlier this month and said himself that the GOP’s path to retaking the Senate runs straight through New Hampshire.** In 2016, outside money from right-wing super PACs and GOP billionaires shattered spending records. Now, I’m one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection, and Republicans are going to spend whatever it takes to try and take back their Senate majority. We can’t match their massive war chests -- and that’s why each and every grassroots donation is so important. **[Our most important deadline yet is just hours away, so I’m humbly asking: can you please chip in $5 or whatever you can today? I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important -- but I could really use your help right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31653600/293333186/1251890980?refcode=e20210630_inactives&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkxMWVhYy1hOGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjmTSawANs4CitbkksErCplB13-s0qDRuTMn7fD2C4Y=)** Thank you so much for your support. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31653603/293333194/1251890980?refcode=e20210630_inactives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkxMWVhYy1hOGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjmTSawANs4CitbkksErCplB13-s0qDRuTMn7fD2C4Y=)

name: Amy Ryan Courser
subject: Deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats like Kurt Schrader are desperate to divert attention away from their many failures. | | [](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351850:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r "Amy Ryan Courser for Congress")
---

| Team - Democrat Kurt Schrader wants voters to believe he is a centrist - but that's not true. Schrader's votes rarely diverge from the most extreme members of his party, like The Squad. **_In fact, Schrader votes with Nancy Pelosi 98% of the time._ **His recent votes helped weaken national and border security and led to rising inflation. Our nation now faces a border crisis and working families across the country face steep prices for basic goods. We must take back the House of Representatives - our nation cannot continue to bear the consequences of the Democrats' agenda. With Republicans just FIVE seats away from taking back the House, victory is within reach. **But we need your help.** | [WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351849:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r)
---
We are so close to our end-of-month fundraising deadline - and I need your help to meet our goal. **Your contribution today helps close our $1,032 gap.[Will you help us ensure we have the support we need to take back the House?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351848:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r)**

Democrats like Kurt Schrader are desperate to divert attention away from their many failures. They don't want to talk about the problems that impact the lives of day-to-day Americans. Time and time again, they attempt to focus public attention on the past or trivial squabbles. And the media is complicit.

Flipping our district from blue to red is possible - we came very close in 2020. **_I am honored to have received the highest number of votes for a Republican in our district 's history. _**

If we are going to win back the House, we need a strong team behind us. Unlike the Democrats, Republicans don't have the media to help us deliver our message.

That's why it's so important that we build the resources to do the job ourselves - and we must start now. **[Will you contribute $100, $75, or even just $25 to help us win back the House today?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351848:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r)**
[WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351849:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r)
---
Thank you,

Amy Ryan Courser
Conservative Republican for Congress

[DONATE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58351849:WX6cAcdoN:m:1:2412808561:884D7994768E8F152C5649204E53CFFD:r)
---
|

name: Team Franchot
subject: Deadline looming
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We’re running up against our end of month fundraising deadline tonight, so we’ll keep this quick!
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’ve been making great progress towards reaching our fundraising goal for June. But as of right now, we’re just $7,500 short of our goal -- so we’re looking for a huge number of grassroots donations to make up the difference!
Will you help us hit our June fundraising goal by our 11:59 PM deadline tonight? Any amount you can give will go a long way for our campaign!

Peter Franchot was the first person to announce his candidacy for 2022, and since then our people-powered movement has grown at a record-breaking pace. He’s already received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials from every county in Maryland -- and every weekend, our campaign is knocking on doors and placing phone calls to build our growing coalition.
By chipping in, you can help us continue to print more field literature and yard signs, hire more organizers, run more digital ads, and ultimately grow our grassroots coalition to secure a better future for Maryland’s communities.
Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. Click here to help us meet our fundraising goals before our 11:59 PM deadline tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june2021fundraising?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot

name: Jay Jones
subject: Deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VpjouZawFv-v9mTmbOf0r69tec2mxR4dS4BhSnK3btc=/niYymFk84RX-akKuIfSWN_4TjuykXAe3trqWQB2yrYE=)
---
Friend -- I'm working hard every day to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but with Glenn Youngkin and his bottomless pockets leading the extreme Republican ticket and fanatical and radical delegate candidates, we know that we have a monumental job ahead of us. [**Tonight is our mid-year fundraising deadline, and I 'm asking directly for your help to make sure we have the resources we need to keep Virginia blue this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VpjouZawFv-v9mTmbOf0r69tec2mxR4dS4BhSnK3btc=/5anM6VXsH4SWw8xktHUjh1_sgdgooZhz3l6QuTVmm5I=) This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. **[I hope you will join me in this fight by contributing to our efforts before our mid-year fundraising deadline at midnight so we can keep our Blue Wave going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VpjouZawFv-v9mTmbOf0r69tec2mxR4dS4BhSnK3btc=/OF6xNexSCeTs8DhiKcVMytbRKJkjKYUNa4KyjOL3qTs=)** \- Jay Jones

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
We’ve been taking a little break from our normal email fundraising programming because frankly, we felt like we had been emailing you all too much. This program can only be successful if we keep our donors and supporters happy!
I’m reaching out today because, as you may know, tonight at midnight is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we need your help. Meeting our quarterly goals is absolutely essential to our mobilization and registration efforts. We are fighting for a West Virginia where ALL West Virginians have a future to look forward to, but we can’t do it alone.
Will you make a donation today, and help the WVDP register, mobilize, support, and elect West Virginia Democrats? We have another $1,480 to raise before midnight! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

| | |
We are seriously down to the wire, and Ron Johnson is _absolutely loving it._

**Remember** : this is going to be the closest, most hard fought Senate race of the cycle. We have a real chance here to flip Wisconsin blue, but we won’t be able to if we don’t have the resources necessary to get our message out and engage with voters from all over the state.

There are less than 24 hours until our fundraising deadline, and all the odds are against us. Our opponents are testing our strength, and we can’t afford to look weak.

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: INDems HQ
subject: Peter, you won't believe what Jim Banks lied about
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Congressman Jim Banks and the Indiana Republican Party proved once again that they are not fighting for Hoosiers like you. After spending millions of dollars last year attacking Democrats by using the so-called “defund the police” movement, it was the Republicans who voted **this year** to defund the police when they said “no” to President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan.
> Fox News' Chris Wallace to Rep. Jim Banks (R-IN):
>
> "Congressman Banks, you voted against that [Rescue] package, against the $350B, just like every other Republican in the House & Senate — so can't you make the argument that it's you and Republicans who are defunding the police?" [pic.twitter.com/mrttqMGLuG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31658586/293351941/-1806369142?JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.=JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk2YWNkYy1iMGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGMskq4cZQ4_p31k7RrftN-Scf6z-zubfzJkoWwtt5E=&emci=634f0339-a6d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cb96acdc-b0d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) — The Recount (@therecount) [June 27, 2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31658587/293351942/-888423121?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw&JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.=JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk2YWNkYy1iMGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGMskq4cZQ4_p31k7RrftN-Scf6z-zubfzJkoWwtt5E=&emci=634f0339-a6d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cb96acdc-b0d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535)
Peter, President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats were not afraid to support the American Rescue Plan. Democrats fought hard to secure $350 billion for officer recruitment and other investments to fight crime. If it means delivering for Hoosier families, we're not afraid to do the tough work. The same cannot be said for Indiana Republicans. **EVERY Republican in Indiana's Congressional delegation voted "no" against the Rescue Plan -- **going against everything that they have claimed to stand for as a party. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31658588/293351943/405560545?refcode=jimbanks.fr.06.30.21.&recurring=1&JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.=JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk2YWNkYy1iMGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGMskq4cZQ4_p31k7RrftN-Scf6z-zubfzJkoWwtt5E=) [**Click here to chip in $7 to the Indiana Democratic Party. We're building our party infrastructure and Democrats need to win more seats from the local level to the U.S. Senate and we are counting on your support. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31658589/293351944/405560545?refcode=jimbanks.fr.06.30.21.&amount=7&recurring=7&JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.=JimBanks.FR.06.30.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk2YWNkYy1iMGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGMskq4cZQ4_p31k7RrftN-Scf6z-zubfzJkoWwtt5E=) Congressman Jim Banks and the Indiana Republican Party are not supporting a responsible, common-sense agenda that will help Hoosier families build back better from COVID-19. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Congressman Jim Banks and the Indiana Republican Party proved once again that they are not fighting for Hoosiers like you. After spending millions of dollars last year attacking Democrats by using the so-called “defund the police” movement, it was the Republicans who voted this year to defund the police when they said “no” to President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan. Fox News' Chris Wallace to Rep. Jim Banks (R-IN): "Congressman Banks, you voted against that [Rescue] package, against the $350B, just like every other Republican in the House & Senate — so can't you make the argument that it's you and Republicans who are defunding the police?" — The Recount (@therecount) Peter, President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats were not afraid to support the American Rescue Plan. Democrats fought hard to secure $350 billion for officer recruitment and other investments to fight crime. If it means delivering for Hoosier families, we're not afraid to do the tough work. The same cannot be said for Indiana Republicans. EVERY Republican in Indiana's Congressional delegation voted "no" against the Rescue Plan -- going against everything that they have claimed to stand for as a party. = = Congressman Jim Banks and the Indiana Republican Party are not supporting a responsible, common-sense agenda that will help Hoosier families build back better from COVID-19. Instead, they are abiding by a level of extreme partisanship not seen in recent history. = us with a monthly contribution. name: Congresswoman MTG
subject: I've fallen behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter -- I am fighting every single day for this country
against the hate-America leftists who want to burn this country
down.

I'm going to hold them accountable:
Impeach Joe Biden. Expel Maxine Waters. Fire
Fauci.

Ban Critical Race Theory. Defeat the
Democrats. FIRE Nancy Pelosi.
But the truth is, I've fallen behind.

In just a few short hours, I'm facing one of
the most critical deadlines that shows my ability to keep my seat
in Congress and keep fighting for this country.
But I'm still $29,288 short of my fundraising
goal and Democrats are prepared to pounce. . .
In fact, they're plotting to unleash TENS OF
MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads to take me out.
DEFEND MTG - DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS - EMERGENCY
DONATE 17.76 BEFORE THE MIDNIGHT DEADLINE
Why? Because I refuse to back down and cave
to the Democrats.
So now, they've recruited Democrat National
Committee Super Delegate and one of Hillary Clinton's top allies
in Georgia to defeat me in 2022.

The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
But the EOQ deadline is in just a few hours.
And unless I have the resources to fight back, my ability to
fight for this country in the halls of Congress is in jeopardy.
So please rush an emergency contribution of
17.76 right away.
Help me fight back and take a stand. Let's
take back America and Defeat the Democrats!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Karen Bass
subject: tonight's FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Friend,

My team and I have been emailing you a lot about tonight's FEC end-of-quarter deadline. I want to explain why.

Because I've been a proud leader in our fight for justice, all eyes are on me. I know national Republicans will be looking through our public fundraising report to gauge the strength of our movement. We have the opportunity to prove ourselves tonight.

We're only $640 away from crossing the finish line, friend. Will you donate what you can now to help us close this final gap before midnight?

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-june21-eoq?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/t5e5KSmoY3zxUuYeE3l_jkH8lDKgs0V_2MV3S7DoVEw=/yJgVvSeSdvLkfsqEb34iwG6wP3vQLheAnykEq9nKwUg=?gpsid=39_132_19563&refcode=em21_210630_eoq5_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_eoq5_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

We knew since the beginning that the midterm election was going to be tough. The president's party has almost always lost ground in the first midterm after his election, but I plan on defying history.

I know we can do this, but I can't turn out strong numbers alone. I need your support. If you're able, chip in now before tonight's deadline »

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: This is what a Republican looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Monica De La Cruz Hernandez is the embodiment of the
American Dream, and she needs our help. Today.

Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who
disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it.
The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal
attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we
believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for
office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared
beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares
our values.
My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year,
Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in
Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had
she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina
Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKEHELP ME GET MONICA TO
WASHINGTON»

Will you please chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now to
help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat
she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily
overcome with the right message and enough support. Monica has my
endorsement, but she won't be able to pull off a win for
Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June
30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize
her goal. Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a
Latina Republican to Congress?

HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»

We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof
of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set
your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a
single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships,
Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream.
Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up
to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what
hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to
deliver for her community.

Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back
the House, and I can tell you that Monica's race is one of the
best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!

On behalf of my friend Monica, I'm asking you to give generously
- whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire
Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress

Chip In Today! ⇒

Paid for by Monica for Congress

Peter,
This fight is not going to be easy and we will fail without the resources to deliver victories in 2022. With the attack on voting rights and Republicans failure to even consider the For The People Act, our democracy has never been more fragile and we can’t trust Tennessee Republicans to stand up for us.
Before midnight tonight will you chip in to help us fight back to protect our voting rights and expand access to the ballot box for everyone? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
With your help, we can send a loud message to our out of touch Tennessee GOP lawmakers while helping to persuade the Democratic majority in Washington to get this done, for the people.

Hendrell Remus

clean_body: Time is running out, and I need your help. | Peter, When President Trump visited North Carolina earlier this month, I promised him that we would do everything we can to protect his legacy and win back the Majority in 2022. Right now, we need 2,637 more donors to step up and contribute any amount. I asked my staff for a list of TOP SUPPORTERS , and they suggested that I reach out to you directly. | | I don’t want to let President Trump down, Peter. He’s counting on you and me to do what it takes to stop the Democrats and win in 2022, and I’m determined to come through for him no matter what. Are you? Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Hi there --
This is the last email I’m sending you before the end of the quarter, after which we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers. We’re still about $11,389 away from our $50,000 fundraising goal.
I know not everyone in our movement is able to make a contribution, but if you’re someone who can, would you donate whatever you can afford at this ActBlue link?

Peter, I have a personal request:

**Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election, which means our race is the Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat and expand our majority. Will you chip in $5 before our first FEC deadline expires at midnight to make sure our campaign has the resources to defeat him?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31663415/293370795/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210630_EOQ12_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_SL2&utm_campaign=em21_210630_EOQ12_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_SL2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRiOTNkNC1iYWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Fq4aPZUJQ7_JxrNVP22vGSMOFENuzZ906rKw7UUV4Q=)

name: Erica Smith
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
On June 30, I am required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised during the second fiscal quarter of the year.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica again.
With the FEC deadline just around 12 hours away, Jayla asked me to reach out and tell you exactly why we must reach our goal of 500 online donations before midnight.
**So please let me explain why[ _making your first donation of $5 to help reach our goal is so incredibly critical..._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210630-224&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)**
After tonight, I am required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised during the second fiscal quarter of the year. Once our Q2 fundraising numbers become public information, everyone will see and make judgements about the strength of our unapologetic North Carolina campaign.
Remember, unlike other campaigns in this primary for the U.S. Senate, we don’t have a rolodex of rich and well-connected donors to turn to. And we certainly don’t have the blessing of the DSCC or the establishment. **That’s why raising a massive fundraising haul by midnight is essential to prove to the Democratic establishment that our campaign has what it takes to win.**
Meanwhile, we’re also up against the GOP. Donald Trump recently endorsed insurrectionist apologist Ted Budd. We know the Republicans will do anything to keep this Senate seat. Already, a GOP super PAC raised $5,000,000 toward winning this seat.
Finally, let’s be real with ourselves. Big, structural change is urgently needed in North Carolina, and I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who supports a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All. All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting for these transformative changes. Send me to Washington and I’ll get the job done — and I’d be the first Black woman Senator from the South to serve in the U.S. Senate, _ever_.
**But in order to get there, we must meet our goal of raising 500 campaign contributions in the next 12-odd hours to prove our campaign is viable and has what it takes to win our primary. We’re pretty close...**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210630-224&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)
If we can hit our 500 contributions goal by the end of the day, it’ll show that our AWESOME team has the momentum to win this Senate Seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I am respectfully asking:
[**_Is there any chance you can please send your first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 500 contribution goal._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210630-224&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210630-224&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)**
Thank you, thank you from the bottom of my heart for supporting our scrappy, unapologetic campaign.
— Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210630-224-footer&t=23&refcode2=224_3698_EfjBD5&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=224%2E3698%2EEfjBD5)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31665785/293381675/-77747052?refcode=em_fr_2021.06.30_b1_mk_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI0MTAzMS1iZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qhBFzAT7EOEdI86mUNHGjtLA-VwIfAnb0Fw9uiycuQw=)**
Friends —

I have an important ask to make ahead of our critical June FEC fundraising deadline today, and Tom O’Halleran said I could reach out to you as one of his top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

We are legally required to report our fundraising numbers for the last quarter and we have to put up a strong showing. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._

**This week, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal.

That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back.

**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

[**If you are able, will you split a $10 donation between our people-powered campaign and Tom O'Halleran? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31665786/293381676/-77747052?refcode=em_fr_2021.06.30_b1_mk_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODI0MTAzMS1iZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qhBFzAT7EOEdI86mUNHGjtLA-VwIfAnb0Fw9uiycuQw=)

clean_body: = Friends — I have an important ask to make ahead of our critical June FEC fundraising deadline today, and Tom O’Halleran said I could reach out to you as one of his top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. We are legally required to report our fundraising numbers for the last quarter and we have to put up a strong showing. But there’s also another reason why this is so important. This week, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022. We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, —Mark **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, . 2300 18th St NW #21337 Washington, DC 20009

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: One final request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
My team says we’re still coming up a little short on our goal
#

Friends,
I had to reach out one more time ahead of tonight’s deadline.
My team says we’re still coming up a little short on our goal, but a big last-minute push can put us over the top.
**Here’s the part where I ask for your support: Could you make a donation to our people-powered campaign?**
[Donate through this email and you'll get a ticket to our end-of-quarter celebration at 8 pm EST tonight! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31667202/293386344/-945309850?refcode2=3a768910-c1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210630-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2ODkxMC1jMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kpq8J60rlYhBxsttul6vz6iX7uRB2uAzAEEJhl1_OQQ=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31667204/293386346/-945309850?refcode2=3a768910-c1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210630-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2ODkxMC1jMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kpq8J60rlYhBxsttul6vz6iX7uRB2uAzAEEJhl1_OQQ=)**
The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of folks chipping in a few bucks at a time to help us cross the finish line.
And every donation means more resources we can devote to bringing a big coalition of Pennsylvanians aboard our fight for a $15 minimum wage, green union jobs, voting rights, and so much more.
Look, lots of folks are counting us out right now, but I’m not bothered by that one bit.
Because I have your support, and that means the world to me.
You’re building the groundwork for a movement unlike anything Pennsylvania has ever seen — and I’m so proud of what we’ve accomplished in our short time in this race.
And together, we’re going to show everyone what a scrappy campaign powered by real working people can do.
So, I have to ask you one more time before we close the books on our FEC deadline. Could you please pitch in before midnight?
Use this link to donate and you'll get a ticket to join our event tonight:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoqmk](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31667206/293386348/-945309850?refcode2=3a768910-c1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210630-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2ODkxMC1jMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kpq8J60rlYhBxsttul6vz6iX7uRB2uAzAEEJhl1_OQQ=)
Thanks for standing with me,
Malcolm
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31667207/293386349/-945309850?refcode2=3a768910-c1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210630-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTc2ODkxMC1jMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kpq8J60rlYhBxsttul6vz6iX7uRB2uAzAEEJhl1_OQQ=)**

subject: I'm being attacked
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fO1IfSSkg7BNHw7K9E_VRFm25lxIPVsd9MgqWYfd6aU=/xvTciyYWhDTMBl8E4tL55-uS3NX6BaDc0JVOJXWjjaY=?refcode=E9998-20210630-ImBeingAttacked-header-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25) | This morning, Fox News broke the story that the House Republican re-election committee is launching a nationwide negative ad blitz targeting me and 10 other vulnerable Democrats to run over the holiday weekend: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fO1IfSSkg7BNHw7K9E_VRFm25lxIPVsd9MgqWYfd6aU=/xvTciyYWhDTMBl8E4tL55-uS3NX6BaDc0JVOJXWjjaY=?refcode=E9998-20210630-ImBeingAttacked-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25) **I 'm being attacked, Peter, and I need your help. Can you please rush a donation to my campaign right now ahead of tonight's FEC fundraising deadline? Here's the link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-10-Email-June2021-FR-RREOQ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fO1IfSSkg7BNHw7K9E_VRFm25lxIPVsd9MgqWYfd6aU=/xvTciyYWhDTMBl8E4tL55-uS3NX6BaDc0JVOJXWjjaY=?refcode=E9998-20210630-ImBeingAttacked-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25)** After tonight, we'll need to hand in our finance report and make some extremely tough decisions about how big our digital outreach and television buys will be before the election. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: The road to keeping our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Donate to Senator Maggie Hassan's campaign today.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/-YL0Fq6aqRQr/UldEbjlzYXB4OGR0UjVaTUZhWTIzVjErU2V3ZDNaZHZ3d09zZDcrYkRoUEZ2SDliTFVVQlFEZ2JSeEt4TFBMc3VSckI0VXJ5QmdjbUxkK2d6NGxDN3REd0tWMVNTWUdHM1RGU21Ca0V3Z1k9S0/Z2lRc2xyYnRjK2hMR0NScmRNZGtkbVRVY3RUdHVoYWxtUzh1MW8xOVBWRmhmRzltbWZ1N3NrblNyZVM1RjlPOWJ6S2V1cmVQUG05R1JWeXhOSVBqZVhqY0FiSkowV1Y4S0) Friend, Democrats hold the Senate by the slimmest possible margin. The road to keeping our majority runs right next door through New Hampshire, where my friend Maggie Hassan is facing her first Senate reelection race -- and it's going to be a tough one. Already, two Republican super PACs and the National Republican Senatorial Committee are pouring money into ads attacking Maggie in her home state -- _and the GOP hasn 't even named a candidate to run against her yet._ And they're probably feeling pretty good about their chances. In 2020, both chambers of New Hampshire's state legislature flipped red -- and Maggie's seat in the Senate could be next if we don't act now. [**Today is the last chance to donate before campaigns officially report their fundraising numbers to the FEC. Will you donate right now to Senator Hassan 's reelection campaign so we can keep the Senate blue? **](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) _If you 've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split evenly between Patrick Leahy and Maggie Hassan._ | | [**$15 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
| | [**$35 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
| [**$100 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/j~94s-w9-kHy/UldEbjlzYXB4OGR0UjVaTUZhWTIzVjErU2V3ZDNaZHZ3d09zZDcrYkRoUEZ2SDliTFVVQlFEZ2JSeEt4TFBMc3VSckI0VXJ5QmdjbUxkK2d6NGxDN3REd0tWMVNTWUdHM1RGU21Ca0V3Z1k9S0/Z2lRc2xyYnRjK2hMR0NScmRNZGtkbVRVY3RUdHVoYWxtUzh1MW8xOVBWRmhmRzltbWZ1N3NrblNyZVM1RjlPOWJ6S2V1cmVQUG05R1JWeXhOSVBqZVhqY0FiSkowV1Y4S0)
---
| | [**OTHER »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
In 2016, then-Governor Hassan won her Senate election by just 1,017 votes, so we can't take anything for granted. Those 1,017 votes helped protect the Affordable Care Act and pass the American Rescue Plan. Without these votes, or Senator Hassan in Congress, millions of Americans would lack health care, and many more would be struggling without adequate relief during the pandemic.
According to CNN, this Senate seat is one that's most at risk for Democrats in 2022. I don't need to remind you how slim our majority is and how much progress we could lose if we don't hold onto every single seat next year.
[**Let 's make sure Senator Hassan has the resources to stand strong against Republican attacks in New Hampshire. If you want to see more progress and less obstruction, please chip in before tonight's crucial end-of-quarter deadline to help keep the Senate blue.**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
Thank you for your help.
Sincerely,
Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator
[DONATE »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)

body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "Defund") Peter, Shooting 73% Robbery 46.7% Grand Larceny 35.6% Felony Assault 20.5% All of this happened in ONE MONTH in New York City - and I am worried this is only the beginning - I worry that it is heading to our streets, all while Joe Biden's party is defunding the police. **Someone needs to stand up, and if they refuse to help the American people - it is up to us. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "STAND WITH JOSH")[Will you stand with me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "Will you stand with me?")** Democrats are happy to watch crime threaten your family if it helps him appease the radical left - but I can't sit back and watch this happen. I have introduced a bill to put 100,000 new police officers on our streets and end the violence. **[You can learn more about my proposal here.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "You can learn more about my proposal here.")** My stand against crime continues to make me a target of the left - I need to know if you are willing to help me fight back **[or if you are standing with Joe Biden, the Squad, and the Defund Democrats.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "or if you are standing
with Joe Biden, the Squad, and the Defund Democrats.")** **Why do so many on the left refuse to admit that fewer cops = more crime? Their ridiculous assertion is costing lives, and _we cannot allow the increase in violence to continue._** There are forces on the left that see a benefit to increasing crime rates. They are playing games with our future - and I won't allow it. **Please - if you value your family and your safety, [I need to hear from you today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57842184:6CNrCilFN:m:1:3103520637:B658C5B9ABA3C17D0D06C575D55D3430:r "I need to hear from you today.")** For America,

Someone needs to stand up, and if they refuse to help the American people - it is up to us. "STAND WITH JOSH" "Will you stand with me?" Democrats are happy to watch crime threaten your family if it helps him appease the radical left - but I can't sit back and watch this happen. I have introduced a bill to put 100,000 new police officers on our streets and end the violence. "You can learn more about my proposal here." My stand against crime continues to make me a target of the left - I need to know if you are willing to help me fight back "or if you are standing with Joe Biden, the Squad, and the Defund Democrats." Why do so many on the left refuse to admit that fewer cops = more crime? Their ridiculous assertion is costing lives, and we cannot allow the increase in violence to continue. body:
I hate to reach out like this, but I just learned Republicans outspent us by $14 MILLION to steal our Majority. I have never needed your $15 more than I do in this moment to save it. >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210630_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25

I am in complete disbelief.

FIRST: Trump teased a run for President if Republicans take back the House.

THEN: Republicans immediately sprang into action -- and just OUTSPENT us by $14 MILLION to win.

NOW: I need a massive Democratic response -- 2,108 gifts before my End of Quarter Deadline -- to BOLSTER Democrats’ resources, DEFEND our Majority, and ensure Trump NEVER holds power again. Can I count on your $15 before our End of Quarter Deadline at midnight? >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210630_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25

I need your help to send Republicans a resounding message:

Under no circumstances will we EVER let you hold the reins of power again.

After desecrating our rule of law...

After spreading vicious lies and mistruths...

After shattering the very core of our democracy...

I vow to fight tooth and nail to STOP Republicans from taking our hard-fought majorities -- and SQUASH Trump’s next run for President if it’s the last thing I do. But I can’t do it without your $15, not when Republicans are outspending us by this absolutely alarming margin. >>

I need 2,108 Democrats to step up and help me SAVE our razor-thin Majorities.

It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $15 before midnight.

Chip in $5 >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210630_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=5

Chip in another amount now >>secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210630_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25
Thank you,

Nancy
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
subject: The Tide Is Turning . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Republican Party of Texas P
body:
The tide is turning. Texas just picked up TWO new congressional seats for the 2022 midterm elections. _And, along with Texas, reliably "red" states like Florida, North Carolina, and Montana also picked up a handful of seats._ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57839170:JjcdCilNC:m:1:3253819041:043CEFA165F706EEC29A32BB49D53A64:r) In other words, we are within striking distance of taking back the House in 2022 and retiring Nancy Pelosi for good. **_[Will you contribute just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today to help us win these two critical seats in the upcoming midterm election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57839170:JjcdCilNC:m:1:3253819041:043CEFA165F706EEC29A32BB49D53A64:r)_** I know that it seems like bleak times for the conservative movement. But do not forget about what happened in 2020. Even with the highly dubious election procedures, Big Tech censorship, and tidal wave of fake news - Republicans came up just 5 seats short of taking back the House. Now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their progressive socialist minions know that their time in power is fleeting. _That is why they have spent the last six months aggressively ramming their transformative socialist policies through Congress._ We must capitalize on the momentum we gained in 2020 by winning these two new seats and inspiring the rest of the nation to reject the socialist policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. **_[And, that starts with your small gift of just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57839170:JjcdCilNC:m:1:3253819041:043CEFA165F706EEC29A32BB49D53A64:r)_** Your contribution of just $2 or more today comes at a critical time. There are only a few days left in the 2nd fundraising quarter of the year, and we **_must_** keep up with the massive Democrat fundraising machine pouring millions of dollars into these new congressional districts. Your gift today will give us the resources needed to recruit, train, and elect strong conservatives who will _fight_ and _win_ to advance our conservative, America-first values. **_[That is why I am asking you to send a contribution of $2 or more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57839170:JjcdCilNC:m:1:3253819041:043CEFA165F706EEC29A32BB49D53A64:r)_** I am counting on you and patriots from across America to help us retire Nancy Pelosi and take back control of the House of Representatives once and for all. Thank you in advance for your timely support. Steadfast and Loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.) Chairman, Republican Party of Texas **#WeAreTheStorm**
* * *

body:

name: Troy Waymaster
subject: Join me in supporting Derek Schmidt.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
My name is Troy Waymaster, and when I’m not representing the great people of the 109th District in the Kansas House of Representatives, I run my famil Friend, My name is Troy Waymaster, and when I’m not representing the great people of the 109th District in the Kansas House of Representatives, I run my family farm of four generations. I also have the privilege of serving as Chairman of the Kansas House Appropriations Committee, which helps shape the spending priorities for our state in the Legislature. I’m writing to you today to announce my full support for Derek Schmidt’s campaign to be Kansas’s next governor, and asking you to join me. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=73716c9fca1a4f4c9771ce4fbaddbde0&_e=Qnm_KmKhvsyh3tbmUrcqCKR0Nodpwl7VksD4NDHhjiVgHKjSj0vpgPipkSzBDL_YDG9Qb4u4IvxvY11Lhq_y_BhBb6mz4Al4-S0wmUepSAhAssKnJFExOehnUmp1PX_eMtk896lmv73gw5EI79Pu6KJqR6RdG9saMNV38ewb_3nvpWc7nlFWM3PHPqd2Dst5fPpo03Le2b1yTw_HyOHedRkWvu2KbNtRqn8AS4s_mAHwLX7_HFM09gcXKHZ2h6UzPGTdAINSziTTrFn7T8LIIblYAJLH7Vc8efC-BDtw63TqWkgeROE_ZvScX23DL-I6VUTVNg33K7LGUB-ptz58cD7nYJ3KoKhUPwFOEtYPZwmcTBIJ35fFiQGecMkNabQ-VCyEq7sbZTXtDtDftPdaxNBdN5dN80LZ7aDyT5tcee50dvOWAaSfo3_LisjYvK9w6t0-5ft3SeOcYWp4PgVVaQ%3D%3D) Derek is a proven leader who understands how to get things done. He will be a governor whose driving principle will be to ensure that YOU the taxpayer keep more of the money you worked hard to earn. Throughout his career, he’s fought for Kansas workers, farmers and ranchers, and small businesses - not Big Government - and I’m confident that’s what he’ll do if we choose him to replace Laura Kelly next November. [**Click Here to Support Derek's Campaign >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=73716c9fca1a4f4c9771ce4fbaddbde0&_e=Qnm_KmKhvsyh3tbmUrcqCKR0Nodpwl7VksD4NDHhjiVgHKjSj0vpgPipkSzBDL_YDG9Qb4u4IvxvY11Lhq_y_BhBb6mz4Al4-S0wmUepSAhAssKnJFExOehnUmp1PX_eMtk896lmv73gw5EI79Pu6KJqR6RdG9saMNV38ewb_3nvpWc7nlFWM3PHPqd2Dst5fPpo03Le2b1yTw_HyOHedRkWvu2KbNtRqn8AS4s_mAH3FdoU5PfQ_MHPw26K5BNCi9EkcyXQmM2x4c1RnBSbB9Mx8k-WAycjnnOZ5bYSUScwitaxFVjivPfaLiHo3EUyGFNxtqGL10c75uJhW3_G4h1J8m2xO9yVublDIqq5bO_hG4PAqPNbv0QF9YNlX1mGE1ZoMcvJ-77daHmZB5vLxEukgsJRHyUF4OC_JwfrmbNiQJX8KTf3jWuXzM82ywFRnldbviu132TR5V3Z35Ve4g%3D%3D) The combination of Joe Biden’s policies in Washington and Laura Kelly’s policies here at home have slammed our small businesses and raised costs for our hardworking families. We CANNOT risk another four years of Laura Kelly vetoing strong conservative priorities put on her desk by the Legislature. Derek Schmidt is a proven winner. He’s never backed down from a fight, and he’s never lost a single election in our state. Will you chip in today to help ensure that he becomes our next governor? [**CHIP IN HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=73716c9fca1a4f4c9771ce4fbaddbde0&_e=Qnm_KmKhvsyh3tbmUrcqCKR0Nodpwl7VksD4NDHhjiVgHKjSj0vpgPipkSzBDL_YDG9Qb4u4IvxvY11Lhq_y_BhBb6mz4Al4-S0wmUepSAhAssKnJFExOehnUmp1PX_eMtk896lmv73gw5EI79Pu6KJqR6RdG9saMNV38ewb_3nvpWc7nlFWM3PHPqd2Dst5fPpo03Le2b1yTw_HyOHedRkWvu2KbNtRqn8AS4s_mAHB6yMwV3R95iJUq72bQ99G7u1RbQz7mUoRUE-JgrT15k9jRFNyDLtuKm08XA3wH3gF-zHHcRb1Q5_YBDQOoeRW-GL_2BeyhwQAU_VxiQwmNWs4DOVry-XAhBjWR0pXNzlHSdwtk1aFSGHHlbRhZe25gYLk2OZl19mPPL8NjqFTwMgoMzAns81aUjEKbA4-0YRLaFtdA-gjjKMEmunY2_UAqfdEKk3nX6eU7bHGc49biQ%3D%3D) Derek’s strong conservative values and deep Kansas roots mean that he understands our way of life, and I know that he’ll fight hard to protect it. With the Radical Left in Washington getting crazier than ever, we need a leader who will be a backstop here at home and stand up for our families and put Kansas first. That’s why it’s so important that we elect Derek Schmidt, the conservative choice and our best chance to defeat Laura Kelly in this race. If you agree that it’s time to get back to the Kansas we know and love, chip in a few dollars today to support Derek’s campaign: [**DONATE HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=73716c9fca1a4f4c9771ce4fbaddbde0&_e=Qnm_KmKhvsyh3tbmUrcqCKR0Nodpwl7VksD4NDHhjiVgHKjSj0vpgPipkSzBDL_YDG9Qb4u4IvxvY11Lhq_y_BhBb6mz4Al4-S0wmUepSAhAssKnJFExOehnUmp1PX_eMtk896lmv73gw5EI79Pu6KJqR6RdG9saMNV38ewb_3nvpWc7nlFWM3PHPqd2Dst5fPpo03Le2b1yTw_HyOHedRkWvu2KbNtRqn8AS4s_mAHp6pVuBMcv_OJ8M-c2a9Twy5szBYQfeb8TuquC4qHJfI1D4-AUyLHf00u7Di0-8myBoRocsS0FOBAorOHQNa4l425E2rU8XrZu4VN50Jlf30ZwaeUY_M-kJwgA4wrRBoa6K8sXguPLSXQbpFIKABLHgy8tnCqhyG6xtk5_6IWB0SQ9BwUd_QuGgsl5hFuQbg4rJlnflIe9OMIBBF6u4tEmVA9oSI82k00pT0CvDPNsdQ%3D%3D) We need all of Kansas’s top Patriots to step up and chip in right away to ensure that we win this fight and replace Laura Kelly once and for all. Thank you for any help you can give to make it happen. Sincerely, Troy Waymaster Chairman, House Appropriations Committee Representative, House District 109 | |

name: Rep. Torrey Harris
subject: We're on a deadline and need your help to Beat Bill Lee.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
Nine weeks ago, we launched Beat Bill Lee with the intent to save our state from Lee and his far fringe extremist allies. We have several high dollar donations committed, but first wanted to see if this movement identified with Tennesseans. And you all answered with a resounding YES. We've had over 350 small dollar donations in just nine weeks, but we are still short $3,000 of our goal for the first filing deadline (which is midnight tonight.) I'm asking you to help us meet this goal.
$5, $10, $100, every cent counts and goes toward stopping Bill Lee and every single lawmaker hurting our state. Will you join us by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
I won't ask you for money without telling you what it is for. Tennessee ranks in the bottom five for voter turnout. We've got to contact voters in every corner of the state to tell them the truth about the destruction Bill Lee has brought our state. We'll do this through the most aggressive organizing program Tennessee has ever seen and a modern era digital campaign. Please make a contribution so we can do this work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
Organizing to Beat Bill Lee,
-Representative Torrey Harris
Make a Donation to Beat Bill Lee! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]PS- Don't forget to follow us on social media!

I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became. |

Fellow American,

Let me be clear, as a black Republican... **Reparations from people that never owned slaves is wrong!**

I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and **I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=24af07a85ef5497a86a154697d61474b&_e=XD0cNAteejJGSw5wch3Ww3uBnaireTaTSroWayV0fLrCMzVVRGNgDcTxb17AUU72D_ar3Gfl6i_vGoEZ1CDQb3fNzEYlH6WFc3DQI12v61syVv-qFRX0XxN-AFwLjmCo1H1M4_DMXx6YnuPfFE_jZnwazClQo7bZ_EIw0DYevJSlSmz7L379XzO5URng_D1KBgscKDwGZLhW7WCwcqcv6MI7O2Ip7xoRDfp9eiS04YrE2kBEB_H7KfKCPwgZKhcTS-YTbWxPEsZ66DQT1YER_1ynMLHeEzOLdCZL8S4VXhXv6OzFQjAcjcq46GAII0Y19zR_S0CcW7DBrOfwkjYfZuKfxXeQSGQBhsXi1oh2N1q-16f-V9IBOl3M3H214gyoWGX07Lpn20tTJpYiPQr5QUBfxMmIyHZzXq_EH-VqFYec9zaFAUZQ0LP6ezkUZrH892af7TTT-a972ZFPOnfFAoLw9LCK4ZOWIVCm2rBBKkKJjDWddavsMIlI6IfUhiO0n15ppG3TRjTygBL6D7Sh3g%3D%3D) _Sitting on the land where my father died - his ashes buried under this magnolia tree._

name: Delegate Glenn Davis
subject: Help me Stop Critical Race Theory in Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Glenn R
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Critical Race Theory is tearing our country apart, teaching our kids from a young age to judge themselves and others not based on the content of their character, but based on the color of their skin- **_the exact opposite of what Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. compelled us to do._** Critical Race Theory teaches white children that they are inherently born with privilege solely based on the color of their skin. Conversely, it teaches children who are black that they are victims and inherently have additional challenges to success in life solely based on the color of their skin. We need to stop this madness! **_I’ve been leading the fight against the radical left’s takeover of our schools to put parents back in the driver's seat of their children’s education._** Being outspoken on this issue has put a target on my back. This week the far-left PAC, Swing Left, **_named me one of their 2 top targeted Republicans in the House of Delegates this year._** If, like me, you believe the classroom should be a place for education, not indoctrination, join me today in fighting for our children and their future. You can [**CLICK HERE**](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gfw2-2exlti-8vw41w-hcl28th8/) to make a contribution today. [**_Any amount you can give, whether $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 will go a long way to sending a message to Virginia Democrats and enabling me to keep fighting for REAL education reform._**](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gfw2-2exlti-8vw41x-hcl28th9/) Help me tell the Radical Left that our children are off limits! Sincerely,
---
|
---
Glenn R. Davis
---
P.S. You can also go here to get your Official Team Davis merchandise: [Team Davis Storefront](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gfw2-2exlti-8vw41y-hcl28th0/)
---

But before I ask if you can pitch in to help us get there, I wanted to share something with you. **[In case you couldn’t be at our campaign launch event earlier this month, here is a video featuring some of my speech: a message I hope reaches all Iowans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31675335/293410750/-785975727?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210630eoq4_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzAxOGQ0Yy1jZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6O0kduh727y6FmwwIZFRuUfOySl6A0u1yvYlV2rv5no=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31675336/293410751/-785975727?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210630eoq4_rs_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzAxOGQ0Yy1jZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6O0kduh727y6FmwwIZFRuUfOySl6A0u1yvYlV2rv5no=)

See we all know that’s something’s not right. Our government and political systems are sick. We have so many hurt people that are hurting people. Our leaders are using their words and policy to tell you that you don’t belong here. That your Black life doesn’t matter. That your decisions about your body aren’t your decisions. That diversity and inclusion are not valued. That if you’re an immigrant or a refugee, then you’re somebody else’s problem.
But I say: you come as you are.
**There is a place for you here. You contribute to this community. You come as you are. Be a part of this Iowa that we can build together.**
That’s the core message behind this campaign for governor, and I’m trying to spread it across our state as far and wide as possible through things like online ads, social media, and emails like this one.
**[All of that costs money to do, so that’s why tonight’s deadline is so important. It doesn’t take much to make a big impact: can you chip in $10 or anything you can spare to help this people-powered campaign raise $20,000 before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31675337/293410752/-785975727?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210630eoq4_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzAxOGQ0Yy1jZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6O0kduh727y6FmwwIZFRuUfOySl6A0u1yvYlV2rv5no=)**
