_PeterーAndrew here. _

_I heard my team reached out about this recent crime wave plaguing our cities. _

**_Did they also tell you that Democrats had the audacity to blame our brave men and women in law enforcement for the rise in crime?_**

_After a year of_ __ignoring attacks on our police__ _,___encouraging mob violence__ _, and _c__ __alling to defund or outright abolish them_ ,__they have the nerve to blame our police._

_When the Left is standing with criminals over our police, you know they’ve lost it. _

_That’s not me. I will always stand with New York’s Finest, and I’ll always fight for our police because that's what they do for us every day. _

_This fight isn’t always easy, especially with Pelosi and the radical Left breathing down my neck. _

_Tonight is my FINAL END OF QUARTER Deadline, and I can’t afford to fall behindー_[ _**_will you rush $5 to help me continue defending our police in Congress?_**_](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=20b405b2ccda4d5ca13e230867e52242&_e=iz4o3Zp2Jf4jb7spYl_7QqZzyNROOiLjyie66TsSNBBEFvGNgsSOnYsKnPTCgV6ZbExrhiyS-CbjLmHtUNOb9XVsZKKs93LG0W2XL52rprlesUQETEEPgTQ3cFPK0TRZHOtgKnrFMqq1HZDhBcQB1fdlBk4xU3KelNkZYRCz6X1pPJKm6hWLPeNtQnM_zZMyG4ExjrulraNIL9AwNp-VCVBZNsX41d3E5rk3jAj5GtbvRHWqRJkH01e44a_HO1Z55ttVWPzWl2bHoCSBEZBs-JylMwq-YXXUhENWVqJNdAcngxZdE6RMXTejugYjEKpIhmxhMVtYy198wWNt4arZj4jzLwrjs-z39br54RSaAEKpkTsZLZq221LUwUUmY1MGbV49NhPPTFoAirxoGMM2lUBkt8tGnUijLbMv9QZdS1cOcEqACCYXYvBq55CzWvm4UmgId59Eyb7CBOOlRpXlbAJTsjP5QsSwPTl_bqLLID73s8TQtFus2ef8M6aJdfB1)

| Good afternoon, Peter.

Today is the FEC quarterly fundraising deadline, and while our campaign is stronger than ever, my re-election campaign in this swing district will not be easy.

Raising money **today** means we're in a stronger position for Election Day.

[_**So please, before the FEC deadline at midnight tonight, will you consider making a contribution to my campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/D5Dc9X4b5Wa5HC2XVqkvjcbSlTtXTzSFmpgzAf_NVLU=/DeSS3tffLSOySlaiiV0AujNVPxFQnc3LIWkkZgygRuk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210630-1-EM&amount=25)

My 2020 victory was one of the **four closest** Democratic House victories. Holding my seat is key to holding the majority, and winning in 2022 will be just as hard, if not harder than in 2018 or 2020.

My team and I need to make sure the voters across our district who will decide this race know that I am delivering on the promises I made and working hard for Central Virginians. [_**Your financial support helps us grow our network and communicate these important messages.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/D5Dc9X4b5Wa5HC2XVqkvjcbSlTtXTzSFmpgzAf_NVLU=/DeSS3tffLSOySlaiiV0AujNVPxFQnc3LIWkkZgygRuk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210630-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail

name: Mark
subject: Need you to watch this before 11:59 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
I recorded a video on my iPhone for you, which I've never done before. Would you spare a moment to watch it and let me know if you can help out? When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVjnVN8JLt-WTn7_RQFBMloSNNY-beaVCI43Q-8mGawcJMyzBmdna381Fy_HHvSb1KO4P02tWExLw482gl1lvhCGRkE7dih7PSH6dtEv8aCtHh_d6r1oUoheqBgsKh9eiTALvQ2tbntTripC9XSi_y-xKrtxEWdNSsXIwvYiDX5WRQtHPXgTQAFgBdGj_frjuatZd3LMmxZ_hzyQ2UJNraBg%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground._And the scariest part of all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.

I recorded a brief video for you to watch, as today marks the first FEC mandated quarterly fundraising deadline since I entered the Senate race last month. Would you please spare a moment to watch? **

[](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVd2_FmwLjEW7Wioqyp52DTr80w6pRrz_X1ff5Nom0DLtiIS0Y31eW3fY3QhEcVaBK8zz5V5U0R-6-9CJt018yu9t9BUYWAiruQWUn8OodPFSsrpYPdk62xXpPwA0j-Ro_oIfqNl95u1Yor2k3lTgnmg7DXLx5tcUxeLl34clNJs4ObDc9ok8D3WN6i-X16_I5nRT8rVK62JsiUr7hfVkHjw%3D%3D)
[ PLEASE WATCH BEFORE 11:59PM »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVF87GR-Sf_rNc13UgZ3Xcm5Xt1ZEYPSuw2vNz5zNKn4fNVIEWhvO1QX1oPcoJ0KhLJXWEYjcCSqjV3CZ0XRj32JqL1Mod-3oz0SimE6s8zxj3Jgl-hXFrEAjtw_CPaThlQSIOA4_uWCd6XLn1qeiBOSR9FpYoOkgrFzFIg4pTMhaZZC0U5q05cPXvGzwA4Ij1BG7kxLMFGiVf5IQR1L2ZdA%3D%3D)
Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

I am asking you to watch the video I recorded (**[and linked to this email](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVrR2bzZp3kwBx2_ahlCESWJITa6QnBzfYbTE-1qb3lJY0flGpKxqpbaQbhc4fkI1ZFgQUMPnU7qndBiXPbTl6jip1phibvqhIoESH76n4BtEM8yqB1Z90KGdD1nE-F2nB7kYTj-dA5Dd7hVrmYNqqDg5k676yE2D9Xaaq6gtlpBmzVc5gLMyBUt57go0CIb5VxmxmI8W5PoZVSeTnK_76fQ%3D%3D))** because in the month since I've launched my campaign I've become the focus of attacks from my opponents, the Left, and the mainstream media who don't think I'm serious about my candidacy. **[The first big deadline of this race occurs at midnight tonight with the FEC second quarter fundraising deadline. We're still short $5,550 from hitting our goal, and I'm hubmly asking for your immediate help](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVLGojjCPyXiTMtAtD5Iah3TxEexYvUCqxgszBY5YXxGqVWdT5NXpfEbOZvWWJHAYtPo-uQm3Mj6IxikJTAK-GUynqN8H1PdYlfIRqzigS1UqqxzA3_soeOvf42Z1477Qyww3omIFQstOvwQEkNVdMSnA4UPwqQUVn094d_EC0zmVX8fyqjyiaFPDgJWipJoY_5Wj73107au0qgUc0sTxfLQ%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVA9RI9QbG1a7yl6CMiN8dYfC4wUo1gYQKG4XALkv6JVd8D1NVeOprdYT_GXxafBf-00_cbMRd6m22ptPwaNO3PxErjts5D8Kbcgy3DLbewiRJaG54jN888FMCvHNXJGqhInJrcpEs0fYpQH9y0eJ2M79F2RwUjCKawD36Ac0_Z_SHa_-YjwsP-ePOvtYOaImxQ-3WhomZ2n4Nnjjjjeif9Q%3D%3D)
[ Please watch before 11:59pm tonight »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVcfT1Pe8rtresI-M8StudgGWwwr_VHhs7sn-Tute-l97rH9rf5XcbMPDKJ_ZQn5wgrkM8dZPQ7WfyXIqhhFaq0g5O5l0YQZXc1utcvuTlj_4NfdWlgqdrW3aQHnN-zCSsPmbTPUDfCEGNbaoBQjeRjHIhVoBq6_M9jEIDgH4Tu-_5UIm4P_BjXhdKrTNW2i2_5oSvZRKUViHwqxXmxsbAEA%3D%3D)
**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=1f57fbe753df4a03a6e572ecdb180029&_e=lGG7_2XRqvzOzCyg0IRZ1p_WC76szJqfzOtcZXGteJIZ1eVkUFsoJcWfe1KsRflOyb-xK0zdkb3E45fXIzOJwUsZyCkZHfT-yOvGw1F9hrmhNM0so3DOu1eAgkp_gNZylmSyVuLMZDPDp1Y6uaVf_y7Zq6vJ-uVzFfZHGHnaARsj45bS8rt0SId25d3rwGlBVZwOMfg1rUT_yGWCVdKoPUR1Vl-u9A1p2prcurjlFz0vI10Rr1jz1dkuyEWdeKIVrd1nee7HfosZUePkS6J8tTR9K-p4JYBUffZvc_ic7O4jbFtmuPmjbMntGHr17XKyzXvFNgfi0Fna7H-NnxOvFUtMegawXLJHJSPkHEPJyg3efLUwhsexZpsm_ZIoF-nh6d3-bdpvw6vgISQzVxQM0uIyMfy9JTEj4K8WCtzIpRBoLeLbeU7_tDYHk-6QTHsay4AOs3JUZxr8QzgC3UKDHA%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: I recorded a video on my iPhone for you, which I've never done before. Would you spare a moment to watch it and let me know if you can help out? When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground.And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. I recorded a brief video for you to watch, as today marks the first FEC mandated quarterly fundraising deadline since I entered the Senate race last month. Would you please spare a moment to watch? Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. I am asking you to watch the video I recorded () because in the month since I've launched my campaign I've become the focus of attacks from my opponents, the Left, and the mainstream media who don't think I'm serious about my candidacy. . Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. . name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: as of 9am:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I have good news and I have bad news.

_**The bad news:**_ House Republicans are on a **STAGGERING** fundraising streak, and they now have a record-breaking **$42 MILLION** in the bank.

That's $6 MILLION more than my House Democrats -- _enough to potentially defeat our Majority and buy their way back into power._

_**The good news:**_ There's still time to fight back and turn the tide before it's too late.

_**But ONLY if grassroots Democrats like you chip in $1 to defend our House Majority before my critical Mid Year Deadline.**_

So I'm coming to you directly:

** **[Before time runs out in just 15 hours, will you chip in $1 to protect my House Democrats from the Republicans and their record-breaking war chest?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgVr-)** **

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Your personal link
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for the next campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210630-2256-header&t=1&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)
With only a handful of hours before our FEC fundraising deadline, we’re still short of our important goal.
We rely on small-dollar contributions from grassroots supporters like you who believe in the better world Alexandria is fighting for.
**A $3 contribution from you — especially before tonight's deadline — would make a significant difference for our work together in the months to come. If you’re able, please make your first contribution below using your personal link:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-1?refcode=em-20210630-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-1?refcode=em20210630-2256-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2256_2526796_m20v4p&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)
Your contribution will help us prepare for a tough re-election in 2022. Our race was one of the most expensive races in the country last year — Republicans spent more than $10 million trying to unseat Alexandria.
In order to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting to pass the progressive policies needed to lift up working families — policies like a Green New Deal, student loan debt cancellation, a $15 minimum wage and more — we need to raise the early resources now to set a strong foundation for the next campaign.
Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we receive enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every fundraising goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change.
**We still have a significant gap in fundraising to fill before tonight's deadline, but if everyone who is reading this email chips in $3 — or anything they can today — we’ll be able to catch up in no time. If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a contribution today?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-1?refcode=em-20210630-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-1?refcode=em20210630-2256-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2256_2526796_m20v4p&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-1?refcode=em20210630-2256-P&t=4&refcode2=2256_2526796_m20v4p&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2256%2E2526796%2Em20v4p)

I wanted to check in one more time before our End of Quarter deadline at MIDNIGHT.

[**We’re _so close_ to our goal of raising another $7,500 — if you haven’t pitched in yet, can you please do so right now? **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=2a8e6c5435&e=0b94e583bc)

Democrats are refusing to secure our borders, paying people not to work, and trying to nationalize our elections and ban voter ID.

**We need to put an end to this before it’s too late, and I can’t do it alone.** Will you join our fight and help us take back the U.S. Senate?

[**Please pitch in BEFORE midnight!**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=63974639c7&e=0b94e583bc)

Senator Roger Marshall

| |
By this time tomorrow, we’ll have a good idea of whether or not we’re going to reach our End of Quarter goal of raising another $7,500 — [**if you haven’t chipped in yet, can you please do so right now?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=6441b528f9&e=0b94e583bc)

**Here’s why I’m asking.** Joe Biden and the Democrats took power five months ago. Since then, they’ve set out on a mission to forever change America as we know it. They’ve done the following:
* Paid people not to work.
* Opened our borders.
* Crippled our energy independence by ending Keystone XL.
* **Attempted to nationalize our elections so they have permanent power.**

| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=7dd74fbc7e&e=0b94e583bc)

| Their agenda is as radical as it gets, and I’m working to hold the line against it every single day in the U.S. Senate.

But the truth is, if we don’t have the resources it takes to expose their agenda — and present ours — to the American people, we don’t stand much of a chance of stopping them.

**That’s why I need your help. Every donation — whether it’s $50 or just $5 — will be put towards winning back our House and Senate majorities. **

The next 24 hours make or break our fundraising goal for this quarter. **[If you haven’t already, please chip in now.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=1974d426f4&e=0b94e583bc) **

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: 4 tech giants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, this is a big fight. We need you in it.
#
Peter,
This is an urgent fight between people power and corporate power. Pramila is fighting for people power.
She’s leading the fight in Congress to make it easier to break-up Big Tech monopolies like Facebook, Google, Amazon, and Apple. These giant corporations have so much power over our data, our information, and our lives. Their anti-competitive practices, monopolistic behavior, and failure to respond to the long list of concerns of the public mean it’s up to us to hold them accountable.
Pramila is leading legislation in the House to rein in Big Tech’s outsized power in our democracy. But some of her colleagues don’t have the courage to stand up to these massive corporations. Pramila isn’t afraid to take on tough fights — but she needs to know that you are standing with her:
[**Chip in $3 before midnight to fuel our fight against Big Tech’s monopoly power and show the true power of our people-first movement before tonight’s FEC deadline. Every dollar makes us stronger for the fights ahead.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4139?refcode=em20210630-423&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=423%2E420207%2EY49p7P)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4139?refcode=em20210630-423&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=423%2E420207%2EY49p7P)**
Some lawmakers simply don’t have the courage to stand up to Facebook, Google, Amazon, and Apple, because these Big Tech companies are their donors. Pramila doesn’t take a cent of corporate PAC money, so you always know that she’ll advocate for the people.
When midnight strikes, and members of Congress start filing their FEC fundraising reports, some will be filled with donations from giant tech corporations. Not Pramila’s. That’s why she needs you to step up right now, before midnight, to show the power of our people-first movement.
[**Make a donation before the midnight FEC deadline to help Pramila rein in Big Tech and fight for a better future.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4139?refcode=em20210630-423&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=423%2E420207%2EY49p7P)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210630-423-footer&t=23&refcode2=423_420207_Y49p7P&akid=423%2E420207%2EY49p7P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=423%2E420207%2EY49p7P)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: midnight tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Hey Peter,
Did you see my email below?
My End-of-Quarter deadline is hours away and
I saw you haven't donated to my EOQ Deadline (sometimes our
records take a couple hours to update).
We are so close to reach our goal and you
could help put us over the top with $15, $10, or even just $5.
I know times are tough.
But if you have the financial resources to
chip in . . . I would be extremely grateful for your help in this
critical fight to defend my seat.
Dems recruited a DNC Super Delegate and top
ally to Hillary Clinton to run against me in 2022.
The Dems will be well funded, organized and
motivated to take me out. They'll come after me with everything
they have. I need you in my corner.
Please read my urgent email below and rush an
emergency donation of 15 or more right away. The deadline is
midnight tonight.
DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
--MTG

Dear Peter -- I'm sick and tired of radical
Democrats not being held accountable.
Every single day in the halls of Congress,
I'm fighting to do exactly that:
Impeach Joe Biden.
Expel Maxine Waters.
Fire Fauci.
And because I refuse to back down and shut
up, Democrats have painted a big red target on my back. . .
In fact, they're on pace to spend TENS OF
MILLIONS of dollars to take me out.
DEFEND MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE - CHIP IN
17.76 BEFORE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
They've even recruited Democrat National
Committee Super Delegate Wendy Davis to defeat me in 2022.

At midnight tonight, I have one of the most
critical fundraising deadlines in my political career: the
End-of-Quarter reports.

These reports are what Democrat operatives
and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong
my support is amongst the people.
They use these reports to allocate Democrat
resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
They even deploy Democrats from across the
country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and
spread Fake News on social media. . .
All in an effort to defeat me in 2022!
As you can see, I strongly need your help,
Peter.
You've stood with me before. I must ask you
to stand with me again right now by chipping in 17.76 to help
me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
Please hurry, the deadline is just hours
away. . .
The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
Can I can count on you to chip in 17.76
right now?
Wendy Davis is an open-borders socialist who
supports stimulus checks to Illegal Immigrants, teaching our
children to hate America through dangerous Critical Race Theory
indoctrination, violent BLM and Antifa mobs, and wants to strip
away our gun rights.
She is handpicked by the Hillary
Clinton/Stacey Abrams wing of the Democrat party.
They are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
And not just the Democrats.
The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz
Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone.

This is exactly why I must ask you to chip in
17.76 right now.
Help me fight back and take a stand. Let's
take back America and Defeat the Democrats!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

body:
#

**FIRST:** Gabby reached out to you about how important it is that we hit our 25,000 contribution June FEC goal.
**THEN:** Debbie Mucarsel-Powel, Giffords’ new Senior Advisor, reached out personally requesting you join us in urging the Senate to pass universal background checks. She knows we need a lot of resources to do our part and save lives.
**NOW:** We’re only 572 donations away from achieving our goal and we’re reaching out to see if you can add a donation before our deadline tonight at midnight.
Our FEC fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight and once it’s over we will be legally required to report our results. If they are good, it’ll send a message to the NRA that we aren’t backing down without a fight.
[**So let’s finish as strong as we can! If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 25,000 donation FEC fundraising goal? name: Bobby Jindal
subject: COVID's liberal religious revival – how their God-less theocracy's destroying politics, culture
body:
What is unique about COVID that brought this new left religiosity to the fore? [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8e64b62759664ebea4d885a7a543f07e&_e=jJwdXXH5KqpKjSmegrD2Vzlg9-2dyNm00w1qHygNAihGDgTAmfx-Dat672VarmRZZk-TjLzqR008nB7tOvjxlTnWIvhOAzwR1pzOGHj5T7Q_DyT5dDHZ7Eqki1kHaTw0AkUPyEW1VCEXVNDMBJJlWCDniWlsepYBBNVrYUFeN3UfRXRTKG9jPox1g9xabdkP0snFTlLalpinHXeYVyy0qgGqIwLXqRyokL36w7jUYt6P_TdONuCy1N7xY26HWC9IbHRsUeasSfwhbLOF8zeXmg%3D%3D) | |
---
**COVID's liberal religious revival – how their God-less theocracy's destroying politics, culture**

By Bobby Jindal and Brad Todd
What is unique about COVID that brought this new left religiosity to the fore?
|
---
When the first documented COVID case appeared in the United States 16 months ago, few would have predicted the religious revival it ignited. Unlike the four previous Great Awakenings that expanded Christianity’s American footprint, this revival exposed what now is the country’s most politically powerful religion: Secular Science-ism.

Pollsters have for two decades noted the rise of the "religious nones," people who claim no particular religious affiliation or beliefs. This group makes up less than one-third of the population but skews toward the higher educated, upper income and politically liberal classes. Pew Forum’s research indicates "solidly secular" Americans are 50% more likely to have a college degree and incomes over $150,000 – and 71% of that group identifies with the Democratic Party.

The COVID-19 pandemic revealed these "nones" really are not without a religious belief structure, however. Their behavior is driven by the kinds of impulses, demands and leaps of faith they sometimes deride in more traditional religions.

Rejection of the afterlife and focus on this earthly life pulls secular liberals toward caution – perhaps to an extent that risk tolerance drives, rather than follows, political ideology. This zealous pursuit of a no-risk lifestyle leads to ridiculous and self-contradicting requirements like Gov. Andrew Cuomo’s edict that summer campers wear masks while canoeing, or the continued closure of schools after teachers have been vaccinated.
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8e64b62759664ebea4d885a7a543f07e&_e=jJwdXXH5KqpKjSmegrD2V_ndn1-LJj6AHPGpkuMoHqVlY3sfICPPhwNS0OeeX2R_KerDJJ4tgRmwXDdm9JRf5IhNJfHWJ2vnOO0NKLoC0PxRbWrr6EDSyFePPApUWSPuiyeitpcv5YJ4-zpw2js91TVAAUxF5swViusQDu-8vh0kgw99KZIKP_JckaobN__V16OTnEJ4X0HU0FMQjkGDAJXTtA-znO5W9qJtKc-8SbES20R71TeTowEqWq787l0Bi2qltVH6yTyexxOKX0LsObjsonpKtU_dNRchyEawuzz34UWei17K7GTrc-e4e58uQIXRfG6l5QGDc_KeLFUf6iTtyfhJimInCWejSluzN0I%3D)**.
|
---

Fast-forward 20 years, Elaine is a veteran, nuclear engineer, and _still_ isn’t done serving our country. When she ran for VA-02’s House seat in 2018, Elaine was an underdog. Pollsters and pundits didn’t think that she could flip this seat -- but she did, by _2 points._ Since then, Elaine’s been getting things done in Congress for Coastal Virginians. She was even ranked the 2nd most effective freshman member of the House. body:

---
| | | | | | The Greatest Trump Rally in History

| Hello Peter,
---
| I, Joe Collins, will pay for President Trump to do a rally in the inner cities. People like myself, Kim Klacik, Angela Stanton King and others are doing the work in the inner cities BUT we have no Republican support or presence right here where we need it. Donate now to help me bring Trump to a rally right here in South Los Angeles.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Bring Trump To L.A.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ld1XFShIC36WeOy25tuVqU7-fTPALUf5tKokQFHKudJ0wjXLj7iKAIBQx3HIFwCQyFmVHtqFRjO6GcyiONEGVXvHn4sw8Q-FaNfBifl5PtZHXGeqBO1S7cXQw_Km2ttXrUU2XGoSuBX5vFKHc28WRxhdNph0kKWy5o3gQi5fA3haBoHnv4F9sxrjFfjGZiB&c=y5kb3nT_4VX4I92Zd14igI1tYQWB0Kfz_GbijUv7Stch1dkffv_hZg==&ch=9xQsfzSky8K3Z87MBYsPkX1nZ7ei-Nb9ClLrscNttD3iGF7ZyE0GLQ==)
---
| Our focus should be the inner cities. We are losing our cities to Democrat control because we don't make a point of reaching out. We need to show President Trump that we want him here! And I will pay for it, but I will need your help.
(Watch my video below)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ld1XFShIC36WeOy25tuVqU7-fTPALUf5tKokQFHKudJ0wjXLj7iKC5wen37qKauh8dgFs8RnFanraF6lO2onp5sreGxOh4uImrLqmnwu_mDPhYIraWR7X3PZb-hS1PmaW63OPVZkO6eetWXzD78h-bw0qk0P9u87lGM3Jhp-RpBBLynp7R2uw==&c=y5kb3nT_4VX4I92Zd14igI1tYQWB0Kfz_GbijUv7Stch1dkffv_hZg==&ch=9xQsfzSky8K3Z87MBYsPkX1nZ7ei-Nb9ClLrscNttD3iGF7ZyE0GLQ==)
---
| Please support me, so that I can start the hard work necessary to get rid of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Maxine Waters, and bring Conservative ideals back to America. We must turn our country back around, but I need your help. You can do that today, by [chipping in $45, or whatever you can](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ld1XFShIC36WeOy25tuVqU7-fTPALUf5tKokQFHKudJ0wjXLj7iKAIBQx3HIFwCQyFmVHtqFRjO6GcyiONEGVXvHn4sw8Q-FaNfBifl5PtZHXGeqBO1S7cXQw_Km2ttXrUU2XGoSuBX5vFKHc28WRxhdNph0kKWy5o3gQi5fA3haBoHnv4F9sxrjFfjGZiB&c=y5kb3nT_4VX4I92Zd14igI1tYQWB0Kfz_GbijUv7Stch1dkffv_hZg==&ch=9xQsfzSky8K3Z87MBYsPkX1nZ7ei-Nb9ClLrscNttD3iGF7ZyE0GLQ==), in honor of President Trump. Together we will put on the greatest Trump rally in history.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Support Joe Collins for Congress](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ld1XFShIC36WeOy25tuVqU7-fTPALUf5tKokQFHKudJ0wjXLj7iKAIBQx3HIFwCQyFmVHtqFRjO6GcyiONEGVXvHn4sw8Q-FaNfBifl5PtZHXGeqBO1S7cXQw_Km2ttXrUU2XGoSuBX5vFKHc28WRxhdNph0kKWy5o3gQi5fA3haBoHnv4F9sxrjFfjGZiB&c=y5kb3nT_4VX4I92Zd14igI1tYQWB0Kfz_GbijUv7Stch1dkffv_hZg==&ch=9xQsfzSky8K3Z87MBYsPkX1nZ7ei-Nb9ClLrscNttD3iGF7ZyE0GLQ==)

Sincerely,
Joe Collins Republican Navy Veteran running against Maxine Waters for CA 43

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: pretty far behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If even half of the people reading this decided to chip in, we'd reach our goal with time to spare.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210630-1887-header&t=1&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)
I was really hoping I wouldn't have to send this email today, Peter.
In an ideal scenario, we'd have hit our critical $100,000 end-of-quarter goal _several hours ago_ , and it'd be smooth sailing from now 'til our midnight FEC deadline. But it's my job as Deputy Campaign Manager to let you know **that's simply not the case right now.**
Here's where we stand as of a few moments ago:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21643?refcode=em20210630-1887&t=2&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)
We have just over 12 hours left until our deadline, so here's how we close this gap: If even half of the people reading this decided to chip in, we'd reach our goal with time to spare. **John and Gisele are really counting on you to be one of them, Peter — and as their way of showing their appreciation, they're selecting a handful of folks to call to personally say Thank You.**
[**_Will you help close the gap to our end-of-quarter goal by chipping in $5 right now? After running the numbers, I feel confident that if enough folks decide to go above and beyond by contributing for the first time ever today, we'll reach our goal ahead of this mission-critical deadline._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21643?refcode=em20210630-1887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21643?refcode=em20210630-1887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)**
John said from day one of this campaign that this was gonna be a strong, honest, and inclusive movement for all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. So, we're always gonna to keep it real with you!
**The reality we're facing right now is that we're still pretty far behind where we'd really hoped to be, with just a few hours to go until midnight.**
The reason this Q2 deadline is so important is that it marks the end of the first full fundraising quarter since John joined the race. So we can't afford to come up even a few bucks short of our $100,000 end-of-quarter goal.
[**_Please contribute $5 before tonight's deadline. If you do, I'll be sure to add you to the list of folks who John and Gisele might call to personally say thank you for your generous support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21643?refcode=em20210630-1887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)
Just a few hours to go, Peter — let's do this!!!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210630-1887-footer&t=24&refcode2=1887_434096_MFMBPP&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1887%2E434096%2EMFMBPP)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: 40 acres and a mule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became. |
---
Peter,

Let me be clear, as a black Republican... **Reparations from people that never owned slaves is wrong!**

I’m Brian Hawkins, a descendant of American slaves. I just visited the 40 acres of land my family received as reparations for slavery and **I was struck by how those reparations made ZERO impact on the kind of man my father and I became.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4f86d7a0b40f4997890e0a374d8f251d&_e=bkbC36BZyd7YjEY62-nL1YwijQR6DrlqAXFs6Tpp3gA2vnlGQbNSgKI3Z_NpCpQ_Y6Kn31zjyp2Ym3O9dYLkcgo_HzPvvVQ9teHwoAAUvtTHC5UHmh-o0J-38iyCP3v_DxLL1izhVZRy5Y-KE7gEubOEHCNTgWc3l1y-VMZhLh3gIlwIhc5l8TNsCVV_kehD3QJbqnuNPbQU6Y8gztn80x6omdKoggPJNlWd0fmUnLiQKJeaxCWhWJmyhds_58YMTYMr9rp2DM3pb9ehRbKA_ckYj4hYyVa4Yr3pwljjRDKl8ViIXtwjTy-R4JeAROxP48FT0oTBBi0rlUaDYUWiJk0DbujX1tkOvyvuEtqO_RDiVcHFhaALcpPGKBcIzWppXUD9k_Sy34xNytKGjPZnoSgNv4Ts6tM1Dpjt4tSObveM7ZgC-WQJxSmhx1oHtXsjjcfJcx4q_xOJOgFfgkMwggK452FQHQsOa_O6bogPf1b0M_O5YaLJNjLNgTnGly9iTY8I3UGkT_IhWKgWp4cHj5KCuYYE4B3BaRgIM7rlPzRGB_UXuYCtolwvIEWVTiO5SLUpm1djaVcnH3zAuidppA%3D%3D) _Sitting on the land where my father died - his ashes buried under this magnolia tree._
The left believes I’m a victim because of my race. But I’m a free-thinking American blessed with so much opportunity. **That’s why I’m running for Congress to stop the generations of victimhood in the black community, but I cannot succeed without your support.**

You’ve likely received many emails like this one over the last few days, so it’s important that you know why **this midnight deadline is important. **
The fundraising number that Team Fallon reports at the end of this quarter will impact how the Democrats spend their money in the upcoming election.

[**(She is running for Congress against Madison Cawthorn and could use your support as a Founding Donor of her campaign.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686367/293435715/55940207?refcode=em_bs_jas_2106_fr_meghannonboard&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1NDBmYy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDRFwvTj3p3qTHe7de51TGIaN7undggOHdPwM9qBTnU=) | | | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686369/293435717/55940207?refcode=em_bs_jas_2106_fr_meghannonboard&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1NDBmYy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDRFwvTj3p3qTHe7de51TGIaN7undggOHdPwM9qBTnU=)
---
Jasmine and I met in 2004.
I had just moved to Asheville to play semi-pro soccer when one of my friends said she wanted to introduce me to someone. The three of us met at a pub and started to have a great conversation, but I couldn’t stay long. I had a job doing one-on-one soccer training sessions with a kid, and I had to zip over to training.
Believe me when I say that I gave that kid the workout of his life just so I could get back to the pub before Jasmine left!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686370/293435718/55940207?refcode=em_bs_jas_2106_fr_meghannonboard&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1NDBmYy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDRFwvTj3p3qTHe7de51TGIaN7undggOHdPwM9qBTnU=)
When we started dating, we navigated issues familiar to any LGBTQ person or couple -- the daily choices about when and how to come out, the assessment of whether it was safe to hold hands in public. But we knew then and now that love is stronger than hate.
Four years later, we wanted to get married. We chose to have our ceremony in Asheville in front of our family and friends, even though our marriage was banned by law. It was where we had met and a place that was special to both of us. It is where we dreamed of creating a family and building our future together, no matter that the law did not recognize our family. It is home.
**We got married on a beautiful August day in 2008. In the years that followed, we set out to make sure that LGBTQ people across the South could feel at home in their own hometowns.**
Together, we organized a multi-state push for marriage equality at a time when many people said it was impossible. But Jasmine’s organization, the Campaign for Southern Equality, helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi.
I’ve seen Jasmine’s organizing skills firsthand. I know that when she sets out to fix an injustice, she doesn’t stop until it's right. And she does it _with_ people, working together not just to win, but to build relationships and community along the way.
Right now, she’s committed to delivering love, hope, and empathy to our district and to defeating extremist Madison Cawthorn. The decision to get into this race was a family decision, and this is a family campaign. It’s about fighting for the kind of politics and policies that embrace the ideals of love and empathy. It’s about creating a kind of politics where there’s room for everyone at the table.
I have no doubt that we are going to get this done together -- us as a family, and with all of you.
**Right now, Jasmine is working hard to run this grassroots campaign.[That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally to ask if you’ll chip in $25 to become a Founding Donor and make sure our campaign keeps up this incredible momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686371/293435721/55940207?refcode=em_bs_jas_2106_fr_meghannonboard&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY1NDBmYy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDRFwvTj3p3qTHe7de51TGIaN7undggOHdPwM9qBTnU=)**

clean_body: If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . | | Hi friends, My name is Meghann, and I’m writing to you today about my wife, Jasmine. = | | | = Jasmine and I met in 2004. I had just moved to Asheville to play semi-pro soccer when one of my friends said she wanted to introduce me to someone. The three of us met at a pub and started to have a great conversation, but I couldn’t stay long. I had a job doing one-on-one soccer training sessions with a kid, and I had to zip over to training. Believe me when I say that I gave that kid the workout of his life just so I could get back to the pub before Jasmine left! = When we started dating, we navigated issues familiar to any LGBTQ person or couple -- the daily choices about when and how to come out, the assessment of whether it was safe to hold hands in public. But we knew then and now that love is stronger than hate. Four years later, we wanted to get married. We chose to have our ceremony in Asheville in front of our family and friends, even though our marriage was banned by law. It was where we had met and a place that was special to both of us. It is where we dreamed of creating a family and building our future together, no matter that the law did not recognize our family. It is home. We got married on a beautiful August day in 2008. In the years that followed, we set out to make sure that LGBTQ people across the South could feel at home in their own hometowns. Together, we organized a multi-state push for marriage equality at a time when many people said it was impossible. But Jasmine’s organization, the Campaign for Southern Equality, helped win marriage equality in North Carolina and Mississippi. I’ve seen Jasmine’s organizing skills firsthand. I know that when she sets out to fix an injustice, she doesn’t stop until it's right. And she does it with people, working together not just to win, but to build relationships and community along the way. Right now, she’s committed to delivering love, hope, and empathy to our district and to defeating extremist Madison Cawthorn. The decision to get into this race was a family decision, and this is a family campaign. It’s about fighting for the kind of politics and policies that embrace the ideals of love and empathy. It’s about creating a kind of politics where there’s room for everyone at the table. I have no doubt that we are going to get this done together -- us as a family, and with all of you. Right now, Jasmine is working hard to run this grassroots campaign.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I know your support means the world to Jasmine. Thank you. = Meghann | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

subject: Launching The Fight - Fair Fight’s New Newsletter!

body:
We’re so thankful for all of our supporters. To express our gratitude, we're thrilled to announce the launch of our new newsletter: The Fight!
Fair Fight |
---
****

| | Friend - We’re so thankful for all of our supporters. To express our gratitude, we're thrilled to announce the launch of our new newsletter: The Fight! _**Recent Accomplishments**_ This summer has brought an onslaught of voting rights news. While it’s critical for the public to know the realities of voter suppression in America, we think it’s just as important to celebrate our collective wins. Here are some of the achievements the Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action teams are proud to share with you: _**Fair Fight**_
* Georgia had a special election for Georgia House Seat (HD 34), which covers parts of Cobb County, on Tuesday, June 15, 2021. Despite a very tough race, our Fair Fight-endorsed candidate, [Priscilla Smith](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686326/293435559/828828757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), got enough votes to [force the Republican candidate into a runoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686327/293435560/434665257?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) in this historically Republican district. This is a huge milestone and a step forward for this key Atlanta suburb!

_**Fair Fight Action**_
* **Georgia:**
* [Fair Fight Action led coalition efforts to successfully pressure Cobb County into offering special election voters Sunday early voting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686328/293435617/-1660814564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) This is the first time EVER that Cobb has offered Sunday early voting, especially important for the large Black population in the county.
* **National:**
* ICYMI: Fair Fight Action launched the nationwide [Hot Call Summer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686329/293435618/1361141168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) campaign to help educate and mobilize young voters of color and young progressives around HR 1/S 1, the For the People Act (national voting rights legislation). Fair Fight Action has also mobilized through: text banks, town halls, and [celebrity partnerships](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686331/293435627/1709549935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277). Fair Fight Action Volunteers sent millions of texts, and contacted voters in 9 states. Through this outreach, voters made over 30,000 successful connections with their U.S. Senators’ offices to advocate for the For the People Act!

Raffensperger, the groundbreaking [2018 federal lawsuit ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686337/293435650/134397866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleging rampant and unconstitutional voter suppression, has ordered that the case will go to a trial.
* Fair Fight Action is currently preparing for trial where the State will be forced to defend its suppressive practices including exact match, a policy that particularly impacts new citizens and voters of color; voting list inaccuracies and irregularities that obstruct access to the polls; and absentee ballot practices that result in confusion and long lines at polling places.
* Together with a group of tireless volunteers, Fair Fight Action documented the stories of over 3,000 voters! These stories are crucial for the litigation and advocacy efforts. Thank you to the volunteers and thank you to each and every voter who was willing to share their story.

_**A Message from Lauren Groh-Wargo**_ Dear Readers of The Fight, Just weeks before Senators Warnock and Ossoff faced runoff elections on January 5, 2021, 364,000 voters were challenged by True the Vote, a far-right organization. True the Vote tried to kick them off the rolls in a race that was won by 90,000 votes. That type of mass challenge and disenfranchisement is what far-right extremists want. Federal voting legislation must address these types of mass challenges. In this fight they expect us to be scared, but we are not afraid. We name the harm they are doing, shine a light on it, and work daily to build small victories for voters that compound to change over time. Thank you for being part of the fight, and I urge you to grab hold of the victories along the way, and continue to push forward for the sacred right to vote. Yours in the fight, Lauren, Senior Advisor to Fair Fight PAC and CEO of Fair Fight Action _**The Road Ahead**_ **Fair Fight Action** Fair Fight Action is monitoring, tracking, and fighting against a range of attacks on voters from suppressive bills in state legislatures to sham ballot reviews or so-called “audits”. Fair Fight Action is also on the frontlines of the fight for federal voting rights legislation. Here are the toplines on each of these: _**Suppressive Bills in State Legislatures**_ Fair Fight Action is actively supporting key states that are currently facing or have recently faced attacks on voting rights in their state legislatures. We work directly to prevent any of these bills from ever becoming law by elevating these efforts and working on the ground with our partners and allies in the state. As an example, let’s look at Arizona. Arizona Republicans have introduced 30 anti-voter bills this session, and Governor Ducey has enacted legislation that will [strip voters from the state’s popular Permanent Early Voting List (PEVL) in 2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686338/293435654/865020379?id=77606533&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277). Advocates estimate that this bill could remove 126,000 voters, including some 30,000 Latino voters. On June 23rd, [the Arizona Senate passed a budget](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686339/293435655/-1625167367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) with anti-voter provisions tucked in as amendments, including stripping the Secretary of State of her authority to defend election-related lawsuits and allowing third-parties to determine who should be purged from the voter rolls. Fair Fight Action has been working in coalition with Arizona-based groups to fight these and other bills in order to protect Arizonans’ freedom to vote and uphold democracy. _**Scam Election Reviews**_ In addition to Arizona’s sham ballot review, we’ve seen calls for scam ballot reviews or so-called “audits” in at least 7 other states: CA, GA, MI, PA, UT, VA, and WI. These schemes are designed to perpetuate [The Big Lie](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686340/293435656/-408976656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) and the January 6 insurrection. [As noted by Attorney General Merrick Garland earlier this month](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31686341/293435657/-2050720692?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDEwYmNjMy1kZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3CvE0wFqhrI25qN84zXjXltFGFbl2AfLBDxvo-VUGw=&emci=03043784-f0d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7d10bcc3-ded9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), these scam reviews are rooted in disinformation and the premise for them has been rejected by every court that considered related claims in the period following the 2020 Presidential Election. Fair Fight Action will continue to track these attempts to perpetuate the Big Lie, shine a light on their intentions to sow doubt in our election process, and work with our allies to fight back at the local, state, and national levels. _**Federal Voting Rights Legislation**_ In addition to working as a defensive player in states where voting rights are being threatened, Fair Fight Action is working offensively on federal legislation that would prevent many of the insidious efforts attempted or passed in states. That is why Fair Fight Action is continuing Hot Call Summer through July and asking all supporters to call 888-453-3211 and urge their U.S. Senators to support federal legislation that would protect our freedom to vote by enacting national minimum standards for elections and restoring pre-clearance. Furthermore, Fair Fight Action is working to help build the Congressional Record in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to ensure it is as strong as possible. Our amazing phone and text banking volunteers have already reached out to more than 1.1 million voters throughout Alabama, Mississippi and Louisiana, and our declaration drafting volunteers have already reached out to nearly 1,000 voters who indicated they may have a voting story to share--and we are not done yet! Fair Fight Action is working hard to document their voting experiences to ensure Congress understands what voting is like in their state and why the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is so important. Thank you to the volunteers that make this process a reality and thank you to the voters who are willing to go on the record with your voting experiences. Together, we are working to reinstate federal review of state and local changes to voting rules before they go into effect to ensure they do not discriminate against voters of color and to help prevent new voter suppression tactics. _**Georgia Corner**_ **Fair Fight**
* **HD34 Runoff:** Fair Fight is preparing for the July 13 runoff election in the HD 34 special election. After a successful voter education and volunteer program during the special election, Fair Fight’s team is building the runoff plan for voter mobilization and for supporting Fair Fight-endorsed candidate Priscilla Smith. During the special election, Fair Fight volunteers helped to reach HD 34 voters during district-wide text and phone banks to ensure they have the information and resources they need to make their plans to vote.

clean_body: We’re so thankful for all of our supporters. To express our gratitude, we're thrilled to announce the launch of our new newsletter: The Fight! Fair Fight | ** | | Friend - We’re so thankful for all of our supporters. To express our gratitude, we're thrilled to announce the launch of our new newsletter: The Fight! Recent Accomplishments This summer has brought an onslaught of voting rights news. While it’s critical for the public to know the realities of voter suppression in America, we think it’s just as important to celebrate our collective wins. Here are some of the achievements the Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action teams are proud to share with you: Fair Fight Georgia had a special election for Georgia House Seat (HD 34), which covers parts of Cobb County, on Tuesday, June 15, 2021. Despite a very tough race, our Fair Fight-endorsed candidate, , got enough votes to in this historically Republican district. This is a huge milestone and a step forward for this key Atlanta suburb! Fair Fight Action Georgia: This is the first time EVER that Cobb has offered Sunday early voting, especially important for the large Black population in the county. National: ICYMI: Fair Fight Action launched the nationwide campaign to help educate and mobilize young voters of color and young progressives around HR 1/S 1, the For the People Act (national voting rights legislation). Fair Fight Action has also mobilized through: text banks, town halls, and . Fair Fight Action Volunteers sent millions of texts, and contacted voters in 9 states. Through this outreach, voters made over 30,000 successful connections with their U.S. Senators’ offices to advocate for the For the People Act! ICYMI: Hot Call Summer campaign below: Fair Fight Action Litigation: Fair Fight Action is thrilled that the federal court in Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger, the groundbreaking Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleging rampant and unconstitutional voter suppression, has ordered that the case will go to a trial. Fair Fight Action is currently preparing for trial where the State will be forced to defend its suppressive practices including exact match, a policy that particularly impacts new citizens and voters of color; voting list inaccuracies and irregularities that obstruct access to the polls; and absentee ballot practices that result in confusion and long lines at polling places. Together with a group of tireless volunteers, Fair Fight Action documented the stories of over 3,000 voters! These stories are crucial for the litigation and advocacy efforts. Thank you to the volunteers and thank you to each and every voter who was willing to share their story. A Message from Lauren Groh-Wargo Dear Readers of The Fight, Just weeks before Senators Warnock and Ossoff faced runoff elections on January 5, 2021, 364,000 voters were challenged by True the Vote, a far-right organization. True the Vote tried to kick them off the rolls in a race that was won by 90,000 votes. That type of mass challenge and disenfranchisement is what far-right extremists want. Federal voting legislation must address these types of mass challenges. In this fight they expect us to be scared, but we are not afraid. We name the harm they are doing, shine a light on it, and work daily to build small victories for voters that compound to change over time. Thank you for being part of the fight, and I urge you to grab hold of the victories along the way, and continue to push forward for the sacred right to vote. Yours in the fight, Lauren, Senior Advisor to Fair Fight PAC and CEO of Fair Fight Action The Road Ahead Fair Fight Action Fair Fight Action is monitoring, tracking, and fighting against a range of attacks on voters from suppressive bills in state legislatures to sham ballot reviews or so-called “audits”. Fair Fight Action is also on the frontlines of the fight for federal voting rights legislation. Here are the toplines on each of these: Suppressive Bills in State Legislatures Fair Fight Action is actively supporting key states that are currently facing or have recently faced attacks on voting rights in their state legislatures. We work directly to prevent any of these bills from ever becoming law by elevating these efforts and working on the ground with our partners and allies in the state. As an example, let’s look at Arizona. Arizona Republicans have introduced 30 anti-voter bills this session, and Governor Ducey has enacted legislation that will . Advocates estimate that this bill could remove 126,000 voters, including some 30,000 Latino voters. On June 23rd, with anti-voter provisions tucked in as amendments, including stripping the Secretary of State of her authority to defend election-related lawsuits and allowing third-parties to determine who should be purged from the voter rolls. Fair Fight Action has been working in coalition with Arizona-based groups to fight these and other bills in order to protect Arizonans’ freedom to vote and uphold democracy. Scam Election Reviews In addition to Arizona’s sham ballot review, we’ve seen calls for scam ballot reviews or so-called “audits” in at least 7 other states: CA, GA, MI, PA, UT, VA, and WI. These schemes are designed to perpetuate and the January 6 insurrection. , these scam reviews are rooted in disinformation and the premise for them has been rejected by every court that considered related claims in the period following the 2020 Presidential Election. Fair Fight Action will continue to track these attempts to perpetuate the Big Lie, shine a light on their intentions to sow doubt in our election process, and work with our allies to fight back at the local, state, and national levels. Federal Voting Rights Legislation In addition to working as a defensive player in states where voting rights are being threatened, Fair Fight Action is working offensively on federal legislation that would prevent many of the insidious efforts attempted or passed in states. That is why Fair Fight Action is continuing Hot Call Summer through July and asking all supporters to call 888-453-3211 and urge their U.S. Senators to support federal legislation that would protect our freedom to vote by enacting national minimum standards for elections and restoring pre-clearance. Furthermore, Fair Fight Action is working to help build the Congressional Record in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to ensure it is as strong as possible. Our amazing phone and text banking volunteers have already reached out to more than 1.1 million voters throughout Alabama, Mississippi and Louisiana, and our declaration drafting volunteers have already reached out to nearly 1,000 voters who indicated they may have a voting story to share--and we are not done yet! Fair Fight Action is working hard to document their voting experiences to ensure Congress understands what voting is like in their state and why the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is so important. Thank you to the volunteers that make this process a reality and thank you to the voters who are willing to go on the record with your voting experiences. Together, we are working to reinstate federal review of state and local changes to voting rules before they go into effect to ensure they do not discriminate against voters of color and to help prevent new voter suppression tactics. Georgia Corner Fair Fight HD34 Runoff: Fair Fight is preparing for the July 13 runoff election in the HD 34 special election. After a successful voter education and volunteer program during the special election, Fair Fight’s team is building the runoff plan for voter mobilization and for supporting Fair Fight-endorsed candidate Priscilla Smith. During the special election, Fair Fight volunteers helped to reach HD 34 voters during district-wide text and phone banks to ensure they have the information and resources they need to make their plans to vote. Fair Fight Action Hot Call Summer: as a part of Fair Fight Action’s Hot Call Summer, volunteers texted thousands of voters across Georgia for a day of action, asking them to call Senators Ossoff and Warnock as well as Majority Leader Schumer to thank them for their commitment to passing federal voting rights legislation. Juneteenth Lit Drops: As a part of Hot Call Summer, some of the Fair Fight U students (below) attended the Juneteenth Atlanta Parade and Music Festival and handed out over 400 fliers to voters explaining the For the People Act and asking them to call their Senators. **In the News The right to vote is in the spotlight. Provided below are a number of articles that have helped inform Americans all across the country about the deep coordination of the far right when it comes to voting suppression. Mother Jones The Guardian The New York Times The Washington Post Rolling Stone Magazine Additional Ways to Plug In Looking for what to do next? See below for a number of ways to get involved today. Fair Fight Action Volunteer: Fair Fight Action urgently needs support texting or calling voters over the next few weeks to ask them to share their voting stories so we can build the Congressional Record in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. To help us call voters across the country to share their voting stories, sign up . Engage: Follow us on: , , and . The best way to stay engaged is to be on the lookout on our social media for calls to action you and your network can take part in, and uplift them on your own social media! Share Your Story: Wherever you live, go to to share your voting story with Fair Fight Action if you have experienced any obstacles, difficulties, or issues while registering to vote, casting your ballot, or getting your vote counted. Contact: You can reach our team with any questions by responding directly to this email. Fair Fight Sign up ! Donate: You can = to Fair Fight PAC. Thank you for your support! name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz' Emergency Powers Terminated
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=1)
---
Peter \-- It's Official! **YO UR calls, YOUR emails and YOUR financial support clearly worked. ** Ending Walz' Emergency Powers became the top issue at the Capitol and early this morning, the House and Senate voted to End Governor Walz' Emergency Powers effective 11:59 PM on July 1st. Action 4 Liberty's team made over 55,000 phone calls in the last two months, knocked on over 40,000 thousand doors, and delivered ads to hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans - telling freedom lovers across the state to contact their legislators at the Capitol! We've door knocked from Moorhead to Hibbing to Winona. Our team of young liberty professionals donned heavy coats in -30 temps in February and knocked doors through our recent heat wave. All because we were determined to End Walz' Emergency Powers. **We NEVER GAVE UP! It was clear that crony politicians in St Paul didn't care that one man took over lawmaking in our state. So we forced them to care about the issue by bringing intense pressure on them.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=2) This was only possible because of YOU! Without you pitching into this battle with calls, emails and funding this program, none of this would have happened.
# Thank you!
While I'm thrilled that we achieved our first objective of Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, Gazelka and the Political Class have left us vulnerable to this all happening again. Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen introduced the Never Again Bill last March that would actually end Unilateral Emergency Powers. But Gazelka REFUSED to listen to YOU and pass the bill. _Walz could reissue completely new Unilateral Emergency Powers at any time. All because Gazelka was too weak to STOP the budget before the Never Again Bill was passed into law._ Gazelka needs to learn a lesson from the Democrats. Late last night, they were able to force Senate Republicans to pass their radical Public Safety bill or else risk a partial government shutdown. This is how the ugly politics work in the final hours of a legislative session, Gazelka should have played hardball...but he didn't. **He wouldn't even call for this to NEVER AGAIN happen.** Even worse, instead of a resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers, Gazelka stuck the language in the State Government Finance Bill that completely funds the Governor's office and [gives the Attorney General a 22% pay increase](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_emergency_powers_terminated?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=3)! Democrats abolished the provision in the bill that would forgive the fines paid by courageous business owners who defied the Governor's illegal orders. And Gazelka not only gave up on that provision, he helped fund the Attorney General's office that is still going after them! **Our work is not done. Action 4 Liberty is committed to pass Mort's Never Again Bill so this never happens to us again.** So how do we do this? We hired 10 young liberty professionals this summer to come work for our growing operations. We're making serious commitments to protect liberty for the next generation. We need **boots on the ground** to build the political energy needed to pass the Never Again bill. It's crystal clear to us that we need to grow larger, expand our team and bring even more pressure against the Political Class that is destroying Minnesota. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=4 "Expand Our Team") [Expand Our Team](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=4)
---
**We got to this point because of YOU. Your phone calls, emails and financial support enabled our team to drive this issue to the top. Now it's critically important we continue building so we STOP future lockdowns, mask mandates and vaccine passports.**
Let's all be proud of our win, but we need to double down now for the next phase of this war.
You and I can deliver this if we invest in our liberty field warriors.
**[Help Action 4 Liberty continue growing our operations to pass the Never Again Bill with a donation today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_powers_terminated&n=5).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
