clean_body: | Peter \-- It's Official! YO UR calls, YOUR emails and YOUR financial support clearly worked. Ending Walz' Emergency Powers became the top issue at the Capitol and early this morning, the House and Senate voted to End Governor Walz' Emergency Powers effective 11:59 PM on July 1st. Action 4 Liberty's team made over 55,000 phone calls in the last two months, knocked on over 40,000 thousand doors, and delivered ads to hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans - telling freedom lovers across the state to contact their legislators at the Capitol! We've door knocked from Moorhead to Hibbing to Winona. Our team of young liberty professionals donned heavy coats in -30 temps in February and knocked doors through our recent heat wave. All because we were determined to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We NEVER GAVE UP! It was clear that crony politicians in St Paul didn't care that one man took over lawmaking in our state. So we forced them to care about the issue by bringing intense pressure on them. This was only possible because of YOU! Without you pitching into this battle with calls, emails and funding this program, none of this would have happened. Thank you! While I'm thrilled that we achieved our first objective of Ending Walz' Emergency Powers, Gazelka and the Political Class have left us vulnerable to this all happening again. Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen introduced the Never Again Bill last March that would actually end Unilateral Emergency Powers. But Gazelka REFUSED to listen to YOU and pass the bill. Walz could reissue completely new Unilateral Emergency Powers at any time. All because Gazelka was too weak to STOP the budget before the Never Again Bill was passed into law. Gazelka needs to learn a lesson from the Democrats. Late last night, they were able to force Senate Republicans to pass their radical Public Safety bill or else risk a partial government shutdown. This is how the ugly politics work in the final hours of a legislative session, Gazelka should have played hardball...but he didn't. He wouldn't even call for this to NEVER AGAIN happen. Even worse, instead of a resolution to End Walz' Emergency Powers, Gazelka stuck the language in the State Government Finance Bill that completely funds the Governor's office and ! Democrats abolished the provision in the bill that would forgive the fines paid by courageous business owners who defied the Governor's illegal orders. And Gazelka not only gave up on that provision, he helped fund the Attorney General's office that is still going after them! Our work is not done. Action 4 Liberty is committed to pass Mort's Never Again Bill so this never happens to us again. So how do we do this? We hired 10 young liberty professionals this summer to come work for our growing operations. We're making serious commitments to protect liberty for the next generation. We need boots on the ground to build the political energy needed to pass the Never Again bill. It's crystal clear to us that we need to grow larger, expand our team and bring even more pressure against the Political Class that is destroying Minnesota. | "Expand Our Team" We got to this point because of YOU. Your phone calls, emails and financial support enabled our team to drive this issue to the top. Now it's critically important we continue building so we STOP future lockdowns, mask mandates and vaccine passports. Let's all be proud of our win, but we need to double down now for the next phase of this war. You and I can deliver this if we invest in our liberty field warriors. . In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Scott Kelly
subject: My brother needs your help with a public FEC deadline coming up on Wednesday. Can you pitch in a few bucks?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey there — it’s Scott Kelly, Mark’s twin brother (also an astronaut!).
You don’t hear from me too often, so when I reach out you know it must be for something important.
**I’m reaching out today because Mark has a deadline coming up tonight where he will have to publicly report his fundraising numbers to the FEC. So we really need to make sure he hits his big goal of 100,000 contributions from folks like you.**
It’s so important that we help Mark hit this goal, because One Nation, another one of these Mitch McConnell-backed Super PACs, just dropped another $1 MILLION on attack ads against him. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down one bit against my brother heading into 2022.
So I’m here today to help Mark knock this critical FEC deadline out of the park so he can have what he needs to fight back and hold this seat.
I’m not going to ask to give a specific amount, but if you’re able to pitch in a few bucks, I know it’ll go a long way.
**You can use the link below to donate anything you can afford:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/June-FEC-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210630-1-15&t=1&refcode2=891_6688874_ZaSkVI&akid=891%2E6688874%2EZaSkVI)
I know Mark pretty well, better than most.
He’s a real leader and exactly the type of person that Arizona and our country needs in the Senate right now.
That’s why I’m back again to do everything I can to help my brother hold this seat. I know he’s the best person to represent Arizona in the Senate and I’ll fight alongside him to make sure he succeeds.
So thank you in advance for chipping in and for having my brother’s back!
All my best,
Scott Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210630-1-15&t=2&refcode2=891_6688874_ZaSkVI&akid=891%2E6688874%2EZaSkVI)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=891%2E6688874%2EZaSkVI).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Padilla
subject: We are legally mandated to report our fundraising numbers at midnight, so we have to put up a strong showing!
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

March FEC Fundraising Deadline

Contribution Goal: 2,500
Deadline Day: Today!
Suggested Donation:
$3

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210630-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=130_159979_oPxXAu&akid=130%2E159979%2EoPxXAu ]DONATE NOW

Friends —

On Monday, Alex reached out himself about how important hitting our public
June FEC goal is.

Then yesterday, we sent an email personally asking for your help because
if we want to go up against the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding
the Republican recall, we need to make sure we have a deep bench of
supporters who aren’t afraid to speak up or get involved.

And this morning, we’re reaching out again because our deadline is in a
few hours from now and we still have some work to do to finish strong and
hit our goal.

We keep emailing because our deadline is quickly approaching, and we are
legally mandated to report our fundraising numbers, so we have to put up a
strong showing. Which is why we have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210630-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=130_159979_oPxXAu&akid=130%2E159979%2EoPxXAu ]If you are able, will you please add a contribution of
$3 to
our grassroots campaign before our public FEC deadline at midnight? We’re
still a bit short of our 2,500 contribution goal and your last-minute
support could push us over the top.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210630-1-15&t=1003&refcode2=130_159979_oPxXAu&akid=130%2E159979%2EoPxXAu ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210630-1-15&t=1004&refcode2=130_159979_oPxXAu&akid=130%2E159979%2EoPxXAu ]Donate $25

Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this important

Team Padilla

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 🏳️‍🌈 In honor of the last day of Pride, can I ask one favor? 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
We have a historic opportunity here, but I need your help, Peter!

Hi Peter,
It’s Derek. I’ll try to be quick because time is short!
**It’s the last day of the fiscal quarter, which means that in a couple of weeks, I’m going to have to issue a public report of my Q2 fundraising numbers to the FEC, and, to be blunt, it’s important that the number be nice and big -- and[I’m about $2500 short of my goal! Can I count on you to help me close that gap with a donation of $100, $50, or even $10 today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687339/293438862/-1874959920?refcode=6-29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=)**
The thing is, it’s not only the end of Q2, it’s also the end of Pride Month. This was an amazing Pride Month—so many of us were able to get vaccinated and safely gather, and we made up for lost time with beautiful, heartfelt celebrations of how far we’ve come, those we’ve lost along the way, and the promise of an ever-brighter future for everyone.
**I released my LGBTQ+ policy platform yesterday. It includes:**
* **Passing the Equality Act and the Every Child Deserves a Family Act **

* **Banning the archaic, cruel, and scientifically-unsound practice of so-called “conversion therapy”**

* **Demanding LGBTQ+ protections in the justice and immigration systems**

And today, I’m asking you to help me make it a reality by sending me to Congress, where I’ll be CA-08’s first-ever openly gay Congressional representative, and a member of a very small and very under-represented minority in that body (there are only 9 openly-LGBTQ+ congressional representatives and 2 senators right now)!
**But I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money for this campaign, so I need regular folks like you to chip in so I can make it all the way.[Can you help out with a donation of $100, $50, or even $10 today to help me make it happen? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687341/293438863/-1874959920?refcode=6-29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687342/293438864/-1874959920?refcode=6-29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687344/293438865/-370388119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=&emci=c6297da8-ddd9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e72ae0f6-e1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687345/293438867/1746218842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=&emci=c6297da8-ddd9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e72ae0f6-e1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687346/293438869/1746222677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzJhZTBmNi1lMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utc_4uL-8NCUQ9_s0pjEwd5iPRYgotQSQIMEfyvmSfc=&emci=c6297da8-ddd9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e72ae0f6-e1d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867)

clean_body: We have a historic opportunity here, but I need your help, Peter! Hi Peter, It’s Derek. I’ll try to be quick because time is short! It’s the last day of the fiscal quarter, which means that in a couple of weeks, I’m going to have to issue a public report of my Q2 fundraising numbers to the FEC, and, to be blunt, it’s important that the number be nice and big -- and= The thing is, it’s not only the end of Q2, it’s also the end of Pride Month. This was an amazing Pride Month—so many of us were able to get vaccinated and safely gather, and we made up for lost time with beautiful, heartfelt celebrations of how far we’ve come, those we’ve lost along the way, and the promise of an ever-brighter future for everyone. I released my LGBTQ+ policy platform yesterday. It includes: Passing the Equality Act and the Every Child Deserves a Family Act Banning the archaic, cruel, and scientifically-unsound practice of so-called “conversion therapy” Demanding LGBTQ+ protections in the justice and immigration systems And today, I’m asking you to help me make it a reality by sending me to Congress, where I’ll be CA-08’s first-ever openly gay Congressional representative, and a member of a very small and very under-represented minority in that body (there are only 9 openly-LGBTQ+ congressional representatives and 2 senators right now)! But I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money for this campaign, so I need regular folks like you to chip in so I can make it all the way.= In Solidarity, Derek Marshall** Candidate for Congress, CA-08 = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842756:6IH8VilNT:m:1:3253819041:1C8E5C61D56F2F3CD8CA911F915AA1EF:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

subject: *TIMELY* A Special Favor for Heidi
body:
She has a very important deadline at midnight!
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| For those of you I haven't met, my name is Lisa D'Andrea and I'm Heidi's campaign manager. At the time of this writing, we have 12 hours to reach a critical goal for the campaign. We have been encouraged and inspired by the unexpected doors that have opened for Heidi since she made the decision to get off the bench to fight in the battle against the leftist ideology that is tearing down our nation and infiltrating our district. She has been blessed at every turn with fellow Americans who see in her the leadership that we need at a time like this.
The grassroots effort of this campaign is astounding. That's because of you. YOU are the grassroots effort.
---
| Deadline For The 2nd Quarter Filing
---
|
---
| The second quarter for fundraising closes at midnight tonight and every dollar counts.
Heidi is one of you. She's lived in the district for over 20 years. She goes to church with you. She shops in your local stores and supports the local restaurants. Her children know your children.
She understands the needs of the community and has experienced the journey that brought the 3rd district to where it is now. Better than that, she will fight to bring it back around.
Now is the time to press further. Will you help her reach this goal?

clean_body: She has a very important deadline at midnight! | | | | | | | | For those of you I haven't met, my name is Lisa D'Andrea and I'm Heidi's campaign manager. At the time of this writing, we have 12 hours to reach a critical goal for the campaign. We have been encouraged and inspired by the unexpected doors that have opened for Heidi since she made the decision to get off the bench to fight in the battle against the leftist ideology that is tearing down our nation and infiltrating our district. She has been blessed at every turn with fellow Americans who see in her the leadership that we need at a time like this. The grassroots effort of this campaign is astounding. That's because of you. YOU are the grassroots effort. | Deadline For The 2nd Quarter Filing | | The second quarter for fundraising closes at midnight tonight and every dollar counts. Heidi is one of you. She's lived in the district for over 20 years. She goes to church with you. She shops in your local stores and supports the local restaurants. Her children know your children. She understands the needs of the community and has experienced the journey that brought the 3rd district to where it is now. Better than that, she will fight to bring it back around. Now is the time to press further. Will you help her reach this goal? | | | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

Sorry for all the emails team, but this is important. **Our FEC deadline expires at _midnight tonight_. And with just hours left before we close the books, it looks like we’re going to miss our goal.** Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target for taking back the Senate. Mike Pence and the Trump network have started campaigning in New Hampshire. And if we fall short tonight, it’ll only welcome more attacks. We’re close to hitting our goal -- but close doesn’t cut it. I only won this seat by 1,017 votes, and with our razor-thin 50-50 margin, there isn’t any room for error. **[That’s why I’m asking you one last time: can you please rush $5 or whatever you can before our midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687710/293440036/1251890980?refcode=e20210630_mwh-close&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTEyMmFkNy1lMmQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N__JZF6BBIXaVTl6XiKKLzb1U9TMdVOx8JDVrNvoqpY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31687711/293440037/1251890980?refcode=e20210630_mwh-close&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTEyMmFkNy1lMmQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N__JZF6BBIXaVTl6XiKKLzb1U9TMdVOx8JDVrNvoqpY=)

name: John Castorani
subject: I just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
Your contribution to my campaign lets me know that I’m not wasting my time running for CongressFor six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=f1210fb9bbc44024b4f516882edf3beb&_t=5NZi33hCqIBwDpN3I2a6wIQW-l8Q_1tjzLZ89lu9TgzQWMJWVKxRbR5owTyKtsKAVC52FZzZ3D8vNrJFSBwmbh26g_9lcdeMk9hO-m9jR2XRR22SfEDtj37zbNN4qwu7vKQCQTBPJB9yVpKZsSAVSKqkuoFI8IwXSnPuW1FOZZM%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=f1210fb9bbc44024b4f516882edf3beb&_e=fZ_CXB9zTdPr0ewFE8npmurKYoUkglf0KPTgz8GZP4qOqMCxJmcpokY3thdkhlKP2EcAczUgg6_W-fIxiZDqz0zhSMkTL5_mnJMH8itOvrNci-5PsdMug3mJVXMMChL85jCcRJgKhJETpHJwKkE3UliVJFD3PH0_PS06UCLpCgGIJ4RBpW-qJDqLm1_nBUCkFLCKxOYO1DW1EAzgJmEor8Uc3Yq3MGWLAGCWplG3cPRpymeoRv42WnLPjL6ELU6qyqhJENqHsedi8sZAtBfCV2E-uGNL48HaHBjrve7OL5xPCNrIeJX8AuJznYQwUerpBH_J6qBk-wNfsgobenVb1YrxrNYNDeHsqNVv0FdBpNF3ynTwaMXgt2I0-c6d00_UxuUhJbWUhKlrYY8KTQF4pw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I hope you get this email. I know that sometimes computer algorithms can stop emails like this from getting into your inbox.

Anyway, I briefly just wanted to say thank you for taking an interest in my campaign for Congress. I didn’t really know what to expect when I launched my campaign a couple of months ago, but I do know that our country is worth fighting for.**I’m so proud to be an American**.

The truth is that the Left are out to tear down the country from within.

In Communist China, an Olympic athlete wouldn’t have the gumption to even speak publicly about kneeling in front of their flag in protest of their government’s policies, much less follow-through with the stunt in person; no, they’d be sent to a reeducation camp.

Your contribution to my campaign lets me know that I’m not wasting my time running for Congress. Some may tell me it’s a waste of time, but I didn’t join the armed forces and hunt down the worst terrorists on earth for 11 years to be told I have no business running for the House.

If you’re inclined to help me further at this moment, I do have a major FEC fundraising deadline approaching tomorrow at midnight, **[and I’d be especially humbled if you decided I was worth further investment](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=f1210fb9bbc44024b4f516882edf3beb&_e=fZ_CXB9zTdPr0ewFE8npmurKYoUkglf0KPTgz8GZP4qOqMCxJmcpokY3thdkhlKP2EcAczUgg6_W-fIxiZDqz0zhSMkTL5_mnJMH8itOvrNci-5PsdMug3mJVXMMChL85jCcRJgKhJETpHJwKkE3UliVJFD3PH0_PS06UCLpCgGIJ4RBpW-qJDqLm1_nBUCkDesQt52d-rpd-wpGt4Fm6blCQRWkWZ1DTs4uHHE8M-JTA0aTTQ3p-hS-W32LfvnEcolx1nVjMvmCRd8dhBoqX1Xl80o2-PABLipEBjGiF7XZurXOU7s_rfTWlrLgQR5gC7_LfELiQ92oCs-hUG09ONnqgxrMUFajXR_cTf291DFjLIsxvx0Pg-c2s9MnwVyLGIiBNXTIo3qfkUCgIE7Uuw%3D%3D)**.

**Never forget how lucky we are that we weren’t born in a Communist country.**
| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=f1210fb9bbc44024b4f516882edf3beb&_e=fZ_CXB9zTdPr0ewFE8npmurKYoUkglf0KPTgz8GZP4qOqMCxJmcpokY3thdkhlKP2EcAczUgg6_W-fIxiZDqz0zhSMkTL5_mnJMH8itOvrNci-5PsdMug3mJVXMMChL85jCcRJgKhJETpHJwKkE3UliVJFD3PH0_PS06UCLpCgGIJ4RBpW-qJDqLm1_nBUCkuBrUuwftBzsaNRrORi4jr24Xf-h8p0Ukam9GqIJOt3Y7tO_rdViCpJ5lNflNt8HjxqNZaaTRqIJ-3Vil8gQ-mrRWtaN6rQDnwJjhhc-896uWKUHyJU4VaHXhTX94bTbokuH05WXryRpC66AdUIWitVGBtyc9hjS0pPyhHNhOyRTnwu0HJeBT8VyBipAWIdCUv-KLnpUHt7dKRzRl0_tTsQ%3D%3D)
---

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=f1210fb9bbc44024b4f516882edf3beb&_e=fZ_CXB9zTdPr0ewFE8npmurKYoUkglf0KPTgz8GZP4qOqMCxJmcpokY3thdkhlKP2EcAczUgg6_W-fIxiZDqz0zhSMkTL5_mnJMH8itOvrNci-5PsdMug3mJVXMMChL85jCcRJgKhJETpHJwKkE3UliVJFD3PH0_PS06UCLpCgGIJ4RBpW-qJDqLm1_nBUCkY0TYbppxVoX_QDtzFWdicvPoMTHz3VdLQV3qtzbVFO71cEWSevVlP_j7DxT6cP6KgdqMgc8dBLsNXYIMRnEaiTEAqXnJsrb2Y0DkLv4H4URjfcheP4QJxNzT0oWOwqkVPRynjjJIzujyfT19XYWRmf2x8qYcl50NzC0C8O96oCjrHv9qa3kLdqKv3htFtBmInO3G4tj_SJP0TodSCj3Vcw%3D%3D)**

| Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Why tonight’s deadline is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This is our last chance to make an impact on Indiana’s future before we head into the second half of the year. Friend, Governor Holcomb reached out to you on Monday about our End of Quarter fundraising deadline that is now just _hours away._ _Here’s why this is important:_ This is our last chance to make an impact on Indiana’s future before we head into the second half of the year. We need to go into July with our best foot forward if we’re going to capitalize on all the victories we’ve achieved over the last six months. **Governor Holcomb is ready for the challenges and opportunities ahead –– and he’s counting on Hoosiers like you to join our efforts to continue building One Indiana for All.** [**COUNT ME IN: LET’S BUILD ONE INDIANA FOR ALL**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=777e51b55c0047bfb2c173c50674dc12&_e=vQ9yMAOL5YYA_i5kWppZc96cR6ZnMuooMEjxfFw2q3zyDuEMimp_ZnfEchRRnx-sjuAN0LSe-aheqnEH7m-BFdR71avGa83UnCkcMnfuZHg6jB6M4g5x8jcYqDOFHLfiTq4mKmHfQaJ7RxroSCpUyFzA_tYPW-IkrY69jnS-Kvvvo6KacQ6RgDnE1ghe087c6mG49c2HuzfO0491zqv5N1Kwcd7aadHwsqWjx2Us7jgX-EiS23tYzKB-cBHqA8a9fEYr2RxHHt-QmYWBrUzlLOqTe12tWgIf2pUFV_Yr6x_0mJtXzEth4Ar25H2wmBW1RL7DYbCXWjVhAHXqopI-ZP24_pR0p17S5kOLcDXTRwfzv2NS1uJGHXBQdYLLp2Pe0GHhNnamI2kSLpqOUzOghwT23OlIPDhCvDQL4Wy_Y0COqogSiKSA4tIs3aK4-voyzKIrX2fqoWdMfyfQPHDrQpeeOel8cQIUPKyqxH7H71o%3D) Thank you for everything, friend. \- Holcomb Crew \---------- begin forwarded message --------- To: [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=777e51b55c0047bfb2c173c50674dc12&_e=vQ9yMAOL5YYA_i5kWppZc96cR6ZnMuooMEjxfFw2q3zyDuEMimp_ZnfEchRRnx-sjuAN0LSe-aheqnEH7m-BFdR71avGa83UnCkcMnfuZHg6jB6M4g5x8jcYqDOFHLfiTq4mKmHfQaJ7RxroSCpUyFzA_tYPW-IkrY69jnS-Kvvvo6KacQ6RgDnE1ghe087c6mG49c2HuzfO0491zqv5N1Kwcd7aadHwsqWjx2Us7jgX-EiS23tYzKB-cBHqA8a9fEYr2RxHHt-QmYWBrUzlLDHCQ_NTLQJAdFfiarZJN5DVStkjXyOF1149GB63v00OzJVKvYbKLjdSVJcjUosrosdHe4ssUaPrc02yEAjRHvDGHtuZ7EtD-xsX_N7OCNPE4w1I1o22CjDxSl4c2Oo2XvoMEJwqNPRb8krh9QlS-wxZ14ql0nDElZ6n70m45VTozODR2a8Vpuet26JZuJJRFRA-5BMVhG9e4TRF95c6peM%3D) Subject: All I can say is “wow” From: Eric Holcomb [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=777e51b55c0047bfb2c173c50674dc12&_e=vQ9yMAOL5YYA_i5kWppZc96cR6ZnMuooMEjxfFw2q3zyDuEMimp_ZnfEchRRnx-sjuAN0LSe-aheqnEH7m-BFdR71avGa83UnCkcMnfuZHg6jB6M4g5x8jcYqDOFHLfiTq4mKmHfQaJ7RxroSCpUyFzA_tYPW-IkrY69jnS-Kvvvo6KacQ6RgDnE1ghe087c6mG49c2HuzfO0491zqv5N1Kwcd7aadHwsqWjx2Us7jgX-EiS23tYzKB-cBHqA8a9fEYr2RxHHt-QmYWBrUzlLARUgEzO8hLPOdT_HcxfbjftPR6oJrjd2jga-hww0DyfVhtTf7BEyNOIY3jnZjq1IPktxpKwpcX5PnAO68s_4jxlfHZPOua3WSuOgdmf3rG4-a1hDXm6QWTrSWP_vmPgHtq6371Y6794Jnc8V0jYKlhorvf_4XP2TKQURKlNpbk25hXZ_rkKOWUIkSqSFfTVLzcQoHanC82E2vZ500xh6rU%3D) Friend, This week marks the end of the first half of 2021 –– and the start of the second half of what’s already turned out to be a record-setting year for Indiana. _All I can say is_** _“wow.”_** Economic investment and job creation numbers are through the roof. Our rebounding economy can barely keep up with the current pace of the growth we’re seeing, and _that’s a GREAT problem to have as we put this pandemic in the rearview and move forward._ **I’m proud of all that we’ve accomplished together in these past six months, and I know that we can do even**** _greater_****things in the next six months if we keep our foot on the gas.** The rest of the country –– and the world –– are seeing the power of the Hoosier spirit in full force right now. I’ve never been more ready to lead the way with forward-thinking, common sense conservative solutions, **but I’m going to need your help.** **[Please, join me in continuing to build One Indiana for ALL by pitching in any amount before our upcoming End of Quarter deadline at 11:59PM on June 30th.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=777e51b55c0047bfb2c173c50674dc12&_e=vQ9yMAOL5YYA_i5kWppZc96cR6ZnMuooMEjxfFw2q3zyDuEMimp_ZnfEchRRnx-sjuAN0LSe-aheqnEH7m-BFdR71avGa83UnCkcMnfuZHg6jB6M4g5x8jcYqDOFHLfiTq4mKmHfQaJ7RxroSCpUyFzA_tYPW-IkrY69jnS-Kvvvo6KacQ6RgDnE1ghe087c6mG49c2HuzfO0491zqv5N1Kwcd7aadHwsqWjx2Us7jgX-EiS23tYzKB-cBHqA8a9fEYr2RxHHt-QmYWBrUzlLCn09Yu_bA4OUXvo5oOQpjIN5E8ilRPUEpsfc5M-q3deCaSU9RDuf0L6TX9TsfsEMFHoYLT_-9PfpAU8F7ldZ2DYDEgampvVYy5vDORX0AU8tXICAJJ8qmBSBhobusMliT8fvFTvd9DBbvrwgD_8lZtYGHe3zHFPRbnZP-zEaP_lFnTOKxAsA1Ti9zhJmtvf_tTd6Gsp0p2RxcoooFV9ojA%3D)** [**PITCH IN: BUILD ONE INDIANA FOR ALL**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=777e51b55c0047bfb2c173c50674dc12&_e=vQ9yMAOL5YYA_i5kWppZc96cR6ZnMuooMEjxfFw2q3zyDuEMimp_ZnfEchRRnx-sjuAN0LSe-aheqnEH7m-BFdR71avGa83UnCkcMnfuZHg6jB6M4g5x8jcYqDOFHLfiTq4mKmHfQaJ7RxroSCpUyFzA_tYPW-IkrY69jnS-Kvvvo6KacQ6RgDnE1ghe087c6mG49c2HuzfO0491zqv5N1Kwcd7aadHwsqWjx2Us7jgX-EiS23tYzKB-cBHqA8a9fEYr2RxHHt-QmYWBrUzlLPxsduBvYlHaGH5qUfKvogwm9xjSj7LjALxlAwpPat2V8BgbtcenwcQF3_G44iFdi2hnDzWjNzZyVmgUY6LIYfumthzIiBFGaq6OL0OYScKLkto_wAuFK16nFMjjBRoKYz4OYwZ8nqN1UUUds-28jOQle-3QeyAEJHf9EO6fpEABrNpjcRjxz_qxbBwgGKwSEbY1yCrw5Z3P39QMnV-xYCU%3D) Thank you for all your support, Eric Holcomb |

name: Jim Jordan
subject: My final request this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Before the end of the day today we need 1,800 conservatives to help support the campaign. If we don't reach that threshold before midnight, we're going to have to make up the slack tomorrow.

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)
---
**_URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN_**

Peter}

we didn't want to miss one last chance to reach out to you and remind you that **[we have a VERY important deadline TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)**.

Over the past three months we've seen Democrats double their efforts in terms of raising as much money as humanly possible to maintain their tenuous control of the House and the Senate.

Unless we're able to match the millions of dollars DEMS are raising, we're going to find ourselves in bind. Right now, it's looking increasingly likely that, **[without YOUR immediate help](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)** , conservatives like us are going to find ourselves at a financial disadvantage. That would be BAD since we Republicans are on offense as we work to take back the majority.

_**It's CRUCIAL we reach our overall donor goal of 70,000 before midnight tonight**_.

**[Your generosity is the fuel that keeps our movement alive](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)**. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to help us meet/exceed our 2nd Quarter goals.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)

[ Contribute $20»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351783:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)
[ Contribute $15»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351784:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)
[ Contribute $10»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351785:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)
[ Contribute $5»](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351786:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)

We'll be looking over the list of donors periodically today and we're sincerely hoping that we see your name, Peter}

So please, **[contribute ANY AMOUNT that you can IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)**.

Thank you for your time,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58351782:sGCdwcdNb:m:1:2247059263:B9A2D84D7A7B6FF914760B15F349B1A8:r)
Jim Jordan

_We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osGCdwcdNb)****_

Delaware, OH 43015

Friend, have you seen this new straw poll from a conservative summit? **Ron DeSantis is _beating_ Donald Trump for the Republican presidential nomination in 2024.**

He just needs to win reelection first -- and _that 's_ where we can stop him. **[Can you pitch in -- IMMEDIATELY -- to help Charlie Crist defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tcTpMfrMO5PC0dwz3YFclQ==/_ga9QdWWvv0EVbx9l8nAVA==?refcode=20210630_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our deadline is just hours away. Can you chip in?

| Friend, I'm reaching out one last time because our official fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight. You know how much progress we've made here in Washington in just the last few months. But you also know that it was years in the making. **[So I'm humbly asking: If you've been thinking about investing in our continued progress, now is a great time to do it. Chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight, and help get us ready to make progress together.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdRN~XT_/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)** Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/yr7KJR8eLNBG/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
From: Team Inslee
Date: Tue, Jun 29, 2021
Subject: We're raising the standard for bold climate action
[](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/D_r2cG83aVCN/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)
Friend,
Thanks to supporters like you, Washington state is raising the global standard for bold climate action -- literally.
**[We'll explain what we mean below. But first, we've gotta ask: Can you chip in before tomorrow's official fundraising deadline to keep the progress going?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdRN~XT_/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)**
Here's the deal: In our most recent legislative session, we passed a new Clean Fuel Standard that will cut carbon emissions from transportation (our largest source of carbon pollution) and create more jobs in our growing clean energy sector.
What's more, our new Climate Commitment Act puts us on a path to net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, while giving members of frontline communities a voice in policy design and investment decisions.
But for the four months that our legislative session was underway, we were legally barred from fundraising, and now we are making up for lost time. As our official, public end-of-month fundraising deadline approaches, we're asking every supporter to chip in to keep our progress going.
**[Will you contribute before our deadline (midnight tomorrow!) to continue to make Washington state an example of what bold climate action looks like?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdRN~XT_/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)**
With your support, we'll show the rest of the country that bold climate action and a thriving economy can go hand in hand!
Thanks,
Team Inslee

[DONATE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/yr7KJR8eLNBG/cCtuTU1Ld0RPMitTelRHT1FTTFlnaDZWMkJpOWJTNFRsZVJ0VGp4NHlKSmY1d0VTNmZZR05Oc3djK3hYWnpxbGo4RkoyZlNjTlMyWVgzOHlsZlZhY2p2UUxOeEp4eTFZd0RhUnNzb0JKM1E9S0/MTBVK3FZNFlQVG5zOXFkcm9SamRaT3BUc20wWVVPQzF2OWZlNk9xWkZ4ST0S1)

Amazon may have deplatformed Created Equal , but their loss is now your gain. That’s because The Daily Wire has started streaming the Clarence Thomas documentary,Created Equal. But streaming of this highly anticipated film is only available to members of The Daily Wire. If you’re not a member yet, click here to join with codeJUSTICE for 20% off your membership. In the documentary, Justice Thomas shares his views about the failures and demeaning nature of the left’s "racial justice" programs and his decisions on affirmative action and features more than 30 hours of interviews with the Justice and his wife. This is behind-the-scenes access from one of the conservative movement’s most brilliant legal minds — and one of the radical left’s biggest enemies. Don’t miss this one! Ben Shapiro Host, The Ben Shapiro Show

name: Donna Imam
subject: My story
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31689727/293446702/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIyODczNC1lN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_fUmBETeo3He4-TFngZowRVV9sQVAnXOV0dQLQqk3Y=) Howdy, friend.

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in a **[$3 contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31689728/293446703/73064796?refcode=em-06302021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIyODczNC1lN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_fUmBETeo3He4-TFngZowRVV9sQVAnXOV0dQLQqk3Y=)** to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to flip Texas from red to blue. But first, I want to let you know a little more about myself and why I'm in this fight.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31689729/293446704/73064796?refcode=em-06302021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIyODczNC1lN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_fUmBETeo3He4-TFngZowRVV9sQVAnXOV0dQLQqk3Y=)
_My mom always says, "the possibilities are endless."_
I went to Trine University, in the small, rural, Midwestern rust-belt town of Angola, in the flyover state of Indiana. Like many families, a college education would never have been possible for me without scholarships and working while going to school. The opportunity to graduate debt-free made my American dream a reality, and affirmed my belief that everyone should be able to graduate debt-free.

**Early in my career, I witnessed my company move manufacturing to Mexico and lay off all the assembly workers. Many of them had no career options and never worked a decent-paying job again.**

This left a profound impact on me, and I knew I had to do something about it. I started volunteering and was elected president of a large nonprofit that provides free education and retraining to those who lose their jobs.

I have one definite advantage as an engineer: I know how to look at the data and solve problems.

I believe that we have all the solutions we need to big, societal problems like health care coverage, homelessness, student loan debt, and more. But I also know that we need to build the political power necessary to achieve them.

That's why I'm running this campaign:

**[Will you chip in $3 to join my campaign as a Founding Donor? We're still $12,819 short of our $50,000 launch goal. Meeting our goal means we can make a big splash to send a message that we're serious about flipping Texas blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31689730/293446705/73064796?refcode=em-06302021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIyODczNC1lN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_fUmBETeo3He4-TFngZowRVV9sQVAnXOV0dQLQqk3Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31689731/293446706/73064796?refcode=em-06302021-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTIyODczNC1lN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4_fUmBETeo3He4-TFngZowRVV9sQVAnXOV0dQLQqk3Y=)

Friend, my Finance Director just called me with alarming news: We're $4,361 short of our FEC end-of-quarter goal with only a few hours left to close the fundraising gap.
For the sake of time, I'll be blunt here: **We simply can 't afford to come up short this quarter.** The National Republican Senatorial Committee is already targeting this Senate seat. If we fail to raise enough money, the GOP will look at these FEC numbers, think of me as an easy target, and spend even more money trying to flip my seat red and put the Senate back into McConnell's hands.
**The only way to stop far-right extremists from controlling the Senate is by demonstrating strength. If you can help us close this fundraising gap right now it will make a real difference.[Please, Friend, can you donate just $5 - or whatever you can spare - by midnight tonight to help us close this fundraising gap and keep the Senate in Democrats' hands?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1042-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5)**

The only way to stop far-right extremists from controlling the Senate is by demonstrating strength. If you can help us close this fundraising gap right now it will make a real difference. Here 's the best link to give: Thanks for your support, Dick

subject: I need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Hey Peter,

I know our team has sent quite a few emails recently, so I’ll keep this short.

Today’s the end of the financial quarter, and my fundraising team is working hard to make sure we have the money to keep our operation going.

I’ve been getting text updates every hour, and as of just a few minutes ago we still needed to raise $1,182 to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

It’s absolutely crucial that we close this gap — and we’re so close. I know we can get there with your help.

I’m counting on you to chip in right now. Here’s your personal donation link — please, remember to give before midnight tonight: secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_email?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_email?refcode=em_RC_FR_EOQ4_063021]

Thanks so much,

Roy

name: 11-hour-deadline@dccc.org
subject: BEGGING you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
We're calling on 25,OOO grassroots supporters to take our survey and rate President Biden's leadership -- and we're missing your response! | |
| **MID YEAR DEADLINE COUNTDOWN**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
The first Mid Year Deadline of Joe Biden's presidency is in 11 hours.

Will you show National Republicans everywhere that our Democratic Majority is here to stay -- _or will you sit this one out??_
---
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SUPPORTER ID #5907903](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6X-)
| [SUGGESTED SUPPORT: $1 >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We don't have a moment to spare.

Our most important deadline so far this year is just **_11 HOURS AWAY._**

Before time runs out, Democrats URGENTLY need your help to meet our Mid Year goal and safeguard our progress.

**So we 're asking you directly: **[Will you chip in $1 straight away to defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/rr9Yf7-)** **
| | [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cv~)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Failure to meet this goal simply isn't an option.

Republicans have amassed a record-breaking **$42 MILLION** war chest.

They're targeting **57** House Democrats for defeat.

And our House Majority is one of the **SLIMMEST** in modern history.

We can't afford to falter now -- not when Republicans are closer than ever before to reclaiming power.

**[Can we count on your immediate $1 to protect our House Democrats and BLOCK Republicans from taking back the Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45230853&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjAyNzc0MjEyOAS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45230853&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjAyNzc0MjEyOAS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

subject: three sentences

| | | Dear Peter, My latest petition demanding justice for Senior Airman Ashli Babbitt has been an overwhelming success. We’ve received THOUSANDS of signatures from patriotic Americans just like you, demanding to know the truth about an Air Force Veteran and mother that was executed on January 6. In just a few days, we are 1/3 of the way to our short term goal of 10,000 signatures Demanding Justice for Ashli Babbitt. [**If you have not signed our “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition yet, make sure you add your signature right away**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e9c68456c7&e=645b3b1338).

---
| **[After you sign the petition (or if you have already signed it -- thank you!) be sure that you also forward it to at least five or your patriotic friends and family members, and ask them to sign it too](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2590da9ec9&e=645b3b1338).** The Swamp is working overtime to hide the truth about January 6 from the American people. I’m here in Washington battling -- sometimes alone -- to find the truth. Your signature on my “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition today shows me that you’re behind me, and gives me the energy and strength to keep fighting. We’re also coming up on an enormous deadline for my reelection campaign -- the largest deadline yet. Wednesday night at 11:59pm is the END of Q2, and the end of our fundraising period. We have to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC, and we want to have a strong showing. [**So make sure you chip into my reelection campaign after you sign your “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e5cdd2dc17&e=645b3b1338). Those same Swamp Creatures have made me their NUMBER ONE target because they like that I’m searching for the truth. [**A generous contribution of $250 or $100, or even $25 or $10 helps me fight the D.C. Swamp that wants to take me out as I battle for the truth about Ashli Babbitt’s execution**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7469574b25&e=645b3b1338). Thank you for your great and continued patriotism. Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=554d9abb6a&e=645b3b1338) Rep. name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Coalitions=20Team?=
subject: NEW DNC AD: ‘America’s Coming Back. Together.’
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends, We are excited to share with you a [new ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ecfc9a53da&e=d6c5c7d7ec) launched by the DNC titled ‘America’s Coming Back. Together." Collectively, our nation has experienced an unprecedented measure of crisis and grief since the beginning of the pandemic. Now, this Fourth of July, we can collectively celebrate the emergence from this public health crisis. There is still more to be done, but leadership displayed by President Biden and Democrats has helped to make this moment possible. We hope you gather inspiration and hope from the new video. Happy Fourth of July! Sincerely,
DNC Coalitions Team
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| | | | | |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 29, 2021
---

**NEW DNC AD: ‘America’s Coming Back. Together.’**
| Today, the DNC launched a [new ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7492d3671f&e=d6c5c7d7ec), featuring the song “In America” by John Legend, on television across the country to celebrate how America is coming back together thanks to President Biden and Democrats. The pandemic is in retreat, the economy is growing, and families, friends and neighbors will be back together again.
**[WATCH THE NEW AD HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a684b31797&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**

“After 16 months of isolation and uncertainty, thanks to President Biden and Democrats, America is finally coming back together,” said Democratic National Committee Chair Jaime Harrison. “Because of the American Rescue Plan, shots are in arms, checks are in bank accounts, small businesses are reopening, and our country is getting back on track. As Americans get together this July 4 to celebrate our independence, the DNC is making sure they know that President Biden and Democrats are delivering for them.”

The new ad marks the kickoff of the DNC’s push heading into the Fourth of July to make sure Americans across the country know that America is coming back together thanks to President Biden and Democrats. The DNC will also fly planes over beaches in key states thanking President Biden and Democrats, and will launch an America’s Back Mobile serving free Jeni’s ice cream up and down the East Coast.
---
| | |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/about?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=8b65d11d63) [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=8b65d11d63) [update subscription preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=8b65d11d63)
DNC Community Engagement * 430 S Capitol Street, SE * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=c00813ba63f642d5b36da607494d87eb&_e=Im_zp2xfjDeBeCNVjCGCcgOci8e97Unssle13Pev0ca5nuCixr6fu75LE9IVS3M5akSKUo4ufeG8RSKfQVX3TFngYkmR_CNlEhD1IwNoLCamrs5CEaLXzSgcFqG3f6y2TtAqzo1oEsUlHSu2dS1pCaQTmt57wv9NN8s1Od5fm2zayWZGILi6POC9Q_M8mF6LVkwe4NWkmZclZlmFKc1BPFI4AkmqRXJtbW0ojDRuG1M5ZF3ZdZzVOllOUKX3Jxi-GqImm3xWhTioJxS6Ttcw8BDf6cfRpSRYH0Gr8C2QHzbg5IsE85vS-j1HBmnXe7FJUELrCWQrRZIu-zjao3wYTK4CdQvSgJUCPS7OHH7iII-62r7d_p2nqvpsHy6oRtQdxmktvlOXGMSkNwdHOBgbOhvpWZOOKTZBsP5MZjxAYYMX6gQX-iv5vk7Lz74QFXuHu3QcAsRC8Tf6g9I6DTmxJTa9HYyq1NlG7rJYrYHyAdM%3D)

Today closes out my campaign’s first full quarter. I couldn’t have made it this far without you believing in me and supporting me.

**At the start of the quarter, my team set a HUGE goal of raising $300,000 in 3 months. We weren’t sure if we’d be able to make it happen, but my finance team just reached out and said that we’re only $1,700 shy.**

We’re so close! We have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to close the gap, so I have a big favor to ask.

_**Peter, can I count on you to pitch in a few bucks to help us crush this goal and show radical Dems that we’re serious about winning back GA-06?**_

body:
Without your immediate help, we're going to miss our donor goal for the quarter Before the end of the day today we need 1,800 conservatives to help support the campaign. If we don’t reach that threshold before midnight, we’re going to have to make up the slack tomorrow.

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=415d2081db354edfa760f0e4488c2356&_e=CiAgicNIJdgnWvDGt8T-0gfuhlflsgo5aHkizTfiRU--z0wDt-PguQPoTtKvzSopsXsU6iRBlM-5QvFleDvB647csMuLE_f5E9jqUXCS1MUj6Y_AHLT3cZvClLOoLPZg8-cLqBhflzLMQbx3PV_EZZXnm_WAUIgrVpcekzAVwB_9uDujL-hXu7Z-osIuFHMXtTrklCs1x7OrPUIFR5y7tiNgmuw3rGr0Ti62go96nBM-lhu3xTZzjLibRBzAgYQzE_EwnQtJ0v2muraXq5T2397GIjEzPvK3MopriYUENUelI2CIVcnRhl10871R48jaby7ErH9nDf4h98GahkPzxXu_eiGlTSw6DXMUZCjUiEU%3D)

**_URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN_**

Peter

we didn’t want to miss one last chance to reach out to you and remind you that **[we have a VERY important deadline TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=415d2081db354edfa760f0e4488c2356&_e=CiAgicNIJdgnWvDGt8T-0gfuhlflsgo5aHkizTfiRU--z0wDt-PguQPoTtKvzSopsXsU6iRBlM-5QvFleDvB647csMuLE_f5E9jqUXCS1MUj6Y_AHLT3cZvClLOoLPZg8-cLqBhflzLMQbx3PV_EZSzWWMx3rktbEuOQ2NG4ihCRa3aMBbqS7ABu4B-uZLYVv2YEHtmKb0g0WWlhXQRgedWjLV0flA_BV3bx19WHS9Zqm2Eh9SRk2TXcwU2rT1h5OJVGU7ZkJox8Lrbsq90vTrIvqblFDrHF2lAcV_NcE3ysMcZrrjPKQwACIVP21CST-tYJssMeaYbHxb0SLXM6DbTqIdNoCMNx9sw1IodLNjY%3D)**.

Over the past three months we’ve seen Democrats double their efforts in terms of raising as much money as humanly possible to maintain their tenuous control of the House and the Senate.

Unless we’re able to match the millions of dollars DEMS are raising, we’re going to find ourselves in bind. Right now, it’s looking increasingly likely that, **[without YOUR immediate help](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=415d2081db354edfa760f0e4488c2356&_e=CiAgicNIJdgnWvDGt8T-0gfuhlflsgo5aHkizTfiRU--z0wDt-PguQPoTtKvzSopsXsU6iRBlM-5QvFleDvB647csMuLE_f5E9jqUXCS1MUj6Y_AHLT3cZvClLOoLPZg8-cLqBhflzLMQbx3PV_EZYYAq7JfygEfnf12zZx-U_dxF0OKYVwMiTOdXf4D80UDCVWAGYrMnveqyC0qyz3Cfa9eFA-qp0aN1ZfrelLc9NL_wG7VbBaxwClLhNu79Ie3AHN7MEJmFuPV7LQDRk0gbq0WkQlGyYaUGc20FWZuAIV2hG4UzTvMpK0QCxHQF78vzjBt-EwRCfj-KyxJJhQ6bc3sAIxm3vEKtBRhevr5vpM%3D)** , conservatives like us are going to find ourselves at a financial disadvantage. That would be BAD since we Republicans are on offense as we work to take back the majority.

_**It’s CRUCIAL we reach our overall donor goal of 70,000 before midnight tonight**_.

body:
Today is our last day to reach our fundraising goal before our reporting deadline tonight at midnight and we are falling short of meeting our goal. Hi Peter, I will be quick: Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just a few hours away, **and we are falling short of meeting our goal.** It is critical for us to meet this goal becauase it is up to us to have Katie's back and show the strength and momentum of our movement behind her. I would not ask for your contribution if it was not so important, but our **#momsquad****** is powered by grassroots support and most of the donations that we receive are from emails like this.**** **[Will you help us meet our goal tonight at midnight to show the GOP that we are not 'just a bunch of moms in tennis shoes'?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31693278/293459343/1834377524?refcode=0630&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1NjAwMmE3LWYwZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQ6ZYksARwJenaHJD30WscHtfYklO2P4hoz56pdKaDE=)** We are counting on your support especially at a time like this because the GOP is raising massive amounts of money to flip this seat next year. Today, Katie's seat and our House majority could not be more vulnerable. [**So, what do you say? Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can afford to show the GOP the strenght and momenetum of our movement behind Katie?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31693279/293459345/1834377524?refcode=0630&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1NjAwMmE3LWYwZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dQ6ZYksARwJenaHJD30WscHtfYklO2P4hoz56pdKaDE=) Thank you for all of your help. body:

| Friend,

**_We are just hours away from our end of the quarter fundraising deadline._**

**Nancy Pelosi is counting on us to fail; she wants to keep the majority in 2022 so she can continue spreading socialism throughout our nation. **

**_We cannot let that happen._**
---
| [FIRE PELOSI](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=424d92940f&e=13f35c4add "FIRE PELOSI")

| We’ve seen the damage Democrats cause when they have power. **Right now, I am at our Southern Border with President Trump, and let me tell you....it is bad.**

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi have slapped an open sign on our border. The stories from border patrol are harrowing, we have a crisis here and it is only getting worse every day they are in power.

[**_> >> They’ve ignored their job – now it's time to fire them. Can you rush $20, $30, or $50 right now to help us reach our critical goal and fire Pelosi? <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=057b0bd160&e=13f35c4add)

This is an all-hands-on-deck effort; our nation is counting on you!

Best,
Chris Jacobs

body:
Hey!
It’s James. I just checked in on our numbers and we’re just shy of our goal!
This goal is within our grasp, but we’ve only got a few more hours to hit it! Can you give $10 right now so that we can hit this goal before the deadline tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq?refcode=210630-2-email&amount=10]
In just a few hours we will officially be six months from the election year! It’ll be here before we know it and we need to be ready.
Any amount that you’re able to give is huge and can be given through this link: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq?refcode=210630-2-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq?refcode=210630-2-email]
Whatever you’re able to give is greatly appreciated. We’re excited to run right through the finish line and hit this goal.
Thanks so much!
James
Finance Director

clean_body: We need the resources to win Friend, Did you see Derek’s email? We’re approaching the end of our first full quarter since launching our campaign, and we’re counting on Patriots, like YOU, to ensure that we finish strong. Having the necessary resources to defeat the Left is the only way we’ll win and SAVE Kansas from another four years of Laura Kelly’s disastrous leadership, friend. Thank you, Team Schmidt Friend, My family has been in Kansas for 5 generations. There’s no better place to live, work, and raise a family, and I am a firm believer that each generation must leave Kansas better than they found it. For that reason, I have a very important request. I’m running for Governor of Kansas to help bring common sense and conservative leadership to this great state. We need a backstop here in Kansas to defend against the onslaught of radical policies and ideas coming from Democrats in Washington, which is why I need your help. We’re coming up on the end of our first full quarter since launching our campaign, and we must finish strong. Having the necessary resources to defeat the Left is the only way we’ll win, friend. As Attorney General of Kansas, I have a proven track record of fighting for the conservative values that we all share – the values that make Kansas great: We need Kansas back in the trusted hands of someone who fights for families, workers, and small businesses, not Big Government and Woke Corporations. This race won’t be easy, but if we want any chance of taking back our state from Laura Kelly’s poor leadership, we need all hands on deck as we finish out this quarter. Do I have your support? Thank you, Derek Schmidt Candidate for Governor of Kansas | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

subject: I need your URGENT help!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
American men and women are suffering. It’s time to change that. Read more >>
Hi Peter, I wanted to reach out one more time before midnight tonight. We’ve got just hours left before our end of quarter reporting deadline, and **[we’re closing in fast on meeting our goal](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3a7cbffe7c3fd55d/74dbfe1b9fe3ab48c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**! It’s been a tough year – trying to recover from the pandemic while battling liberal policies and edicts that have tried to keep us all down. The Democrats in Congress have shown over and over that they’ve abandoned the working class. Instead, they spend their time sucking up to the Silicon Valley tech overlords, Hollywood elite, and billionaire corporate donors. The result of all of this has been higher gas prices, defunding the police, a full-blown crisis at our southern border, and less and less energy independence. We need to turn things around before it’s too late, which means I need every grassroots patriot to [**step up and donate before MIDNIGHT tonight**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3a7cbffe7c3fd55d/71f7d4da9664e86dc3d6b838967d376c/34143). clean_body: We really have to hustle today to hit our goal Hey folks, it’s Vanessa again. We made a risky move yesterday by increasing our ads budget without knowing whether or not we will hit our fundraising goal tonight. In order for this risk to pay off, we absolutely cannot go into July with a hole in our budget. So we need to bring in 200 more donations by midnight, and I'm hoping I can count on you for one of them, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = I’ll be upfront with you. We don’t have much wiggle room in our budget — none, really. With the fate of our Senate majority hanging in the balance, Pennsylvania is the #1 most important Senate race in the country. So our race is super competitive (and expensive) already, and it’s going to take a lot of resources to elect Malcolm to be the champion working folks need in the Senate. That means every goal we set is real — none of our numbers are arbitrary. And it means we really do have to hustle today to hit our goal before we're legally required to publish our public fundraising report. = Thanks in advance for reading and chipping in what you can. In solidarity, Vanessa Clifford Campaign Manager Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. I wanted to send you a final note before our deadline tonight and thank you for your donations and support so far. This is the first time our fundraising numbers will be public since the NRCC launched its ads attacking me, and we know Republicans are watching our finances to see if their smear ads are working. Let’s show them they shouldn't waste their time or money here! Even though we are up against a ton of national Republican money ($$$) and nationally coordinated attacks, I continue to refuse to rely on cheap, attention-grabbing, divisive rhetoric to make headlines. I have always believed the work will speak for itself, and I continue to stand by that. So I’m coming to you to ask for your help in ensuring our positive, unifying message is heard above the clutter. With only a few hours to go until the quarterly fundraising deadline, I’m personally asking: _Will you make a donation of any amount to my campaign so we can hit our goal and quash the GOP’s attempts to flip this seat?_ **I’m dropping my personal donation link here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCT-05-Email-June2021-FR-no](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31695208/293466591/1522229062?refcode=E9400-20210630-EOM4-SL-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjU0MjllYy1mNmQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ABUCu8ifdeSLH8MQRbTqBpgvtDLeiRE9diSd3KM5IFQ=)** Your donation ensures that we have the resources we need to keep our grassroots movement strong, and every dollar is appreciated. body:
| |
---
| | | Hey Derek-

I just wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday. We are coming up on our quarterly deadline and we're just 17 donors away from where we want to be. [Please consider giving whatever you are able to right now. We would greatly appreciate it. $5, $10, or $25 dollars can go a long way. Consider doubling down and making it monthly while you're at it! Thank you so much for your support in advance! ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=61be13aca6&e=76fc145c69)

You can donate at this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vajdsustainingdonor](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=6322f94b43&e=76fc145c69)

Democratically yours,
Matt
_VAJD Co-Chair _

On Tue, Jun 29, 2021 at 3:02 PM, Virginia Justice Dems
<[vajusticedems@gmail.com](mailto:vajusticedems@gmail.com)> wrote:
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=8e443bbcdb&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Team-

This past weekend we came together with electeds, candidates, and organizations at the 5th annual Women's Summit with Network NOVA, and all we can say is that our squad is definitely growing. We are going to be working with candidates from Northern Virginia all the way out to Norfolk, from Richmond to Roanoke, from Poquoson all the way over to Pulaski. But we can't do that without your help. [Can you chip in whatever you can afford now to help out VAJD? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=66906c724b&e=76fc145c69)

| We're working to make a Virginia that looks like and works for the people that live in. We are currently helping support candidates around the Commonwealth, and we're approaching an important deadline.

We know, boy, we know! You get a million of these the last days of the quarter but we rely solely on the support from folks like you and we're working to make it so that money doesn't play a huge part in politics.

[But in order to change the system, we gotta work within that system. That's why we are calling on everyday people just like you to give to our cause. Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

body:

| Hi Peter,

I wanted to check in quickly to update you on our quarterly fundraising goal. We have just a few hours to go before the deadline, but we’re still $1,613 short of our $25,000 goal.

If you are able, would you consider chipping in before midnight? subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Peter - how have things been going? I've spent most of the afternoon fundraising ... not exactly my favorite thing in the world, but I know how important it is to reach our end-of-quarter goal and keep this seat blue. We're halfway through 2021. I can barely believe I'm even saying that, but this second-quarter fundraising report is going to let Republicans know exactly where we stand right now. Even though we're up against a lot of Republican money and attacks, I refuse to take corporate PAC money. That certainly makes it harder to fundraise, but I think it's important to show that I'm fighting for the people, not corporations or special interests. That's why, with only 5 hours to go until the deadline, I'm turning to you and personally asking, Peter: Will you make a donation of any amount to my campaign so we can hit our goal and fight back against the GOP's attempts to flip this seat? I'm dropping my personal donation link here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-10-Email-June2021-FR-EOQ](https://act.myngp.com/el/cuVoL8_n-QOYODohn4N6fqWX-M9bAK7OXCJcZj66ZpM=/_7SurMXJMlNQW7bxVp3ld2tf_PMX8dPLtvX2VjecrX4=?refcode=E10007-20210630-EOQ9-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA)** I'd be incredibly grateful to see your donation come through before 9:00 pm PST. Thanks for being in this fight with me. We can do this!
-- Josh
---

Modesto CA 95352 United States

| | I want to run a race that I am proud of. Right now, I’m proud of the fact that we are an unabashedly prorgressive campaign that supports policies that will benefit _all_ Wisconsinites.

My campaign is people-powered — because that’s who this race should be about. I don’t have millions of dollars to my name, and I don’t have family money to pour into this campaign.

Throughout my career in public service, I have always been able to fully empathize with the day-to-day struggles of my constituents. _And my public service career has been spent in Wisconsin, not in New York or Washington D.C_.

**My perspective and proven progressive track record make me the best candidate to represent Wisconsinites in the U.S. Senate.**

[But to win this, we need to get our message out to voters in every corner of the state. We still need to raise just over $1,200 in the next few hours. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Ugly truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time because I do NOT accept corporate PAC contributions.
#
Peter, here's the ugly truth about campaign fundraising:
Members of Congress are often told that they should spend up to five hours each day on "call time" — time solely dedicated to calling up mega-donors and PACs to get big checks and ensure reelection. That's more than half of a regular work day.
But as the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and a leader who is championing a big and bold jobs, infrastructure, and families plan, Medicare for All, and urgent climate action, I’m keeping my priorities straight: **Legislating and fighting for working Americans.**
[**So to keep my focus on leading and legislating, we're hoping that you'll help us hit our FEC end-of-quarter deadline before midnight! I’ll even call a few grassroots donors to say thanks, since I’m not wasting time on the phone with corporate donors.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4435?refcode=em20210630-426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=426%2E420207%2E1MrIzM)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4435?refcode=em20210630-426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=426%2E420207%2E1MrIzM)**
I rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time because I do NOT accept corporate PAC contributions. Not a dime. Not even a penny. And every time this campaign gets a donation from someone like you pitching in to an email like this one, we're proving that there's a better way to do politics — a way that puts people first.
[**So, please chip in $3 or whatever you can before our FEC deadline at midnight. To show my gratitude, I’ll call a few of my grassroots donors! So don’t miss out and donate right away.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4435?refcode=em20210630-426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=426%2E420207%2E1MrIzM)
Thank you for being a part of our people-powered movement,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210630-426-footer&t=22&refcode2=426_420207_1MrIzM&akid=426%2E420207%2E1MrIzM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=426%2E420207%2E1MrIzM)

---
| Over the weekend, American athlete **Gwen Berry _turned her back_ on the American flag and National Anthem** after winning a spot to represent Team USA at the Summer Olympics. **[I need you to sign our petition](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842786:JiFP-ilvN:m:1:3253819041:92B2E7B0081D16DF6ADCD41D0E575A11:r "I need you to sign our petition")** **DEMANDING** the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: **[BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57842786:JiFP-ilvN:m:1:3253819041:92B2E7B0081D16DF6ADCD41D0E575A11:r "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this

| After winning 3rd place _and_ a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, **Gwen literally _turned away_ from the American flag** as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. Candace

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-hkoZx1ZKHj9_3-YuCajXwBer7jAaPEmu-ABvxk9DAntTB0h-wCvd5tMyHeqWNk2V5RIupe-1jCxNt6pu-VRz12364W0TKEYSJvo-P-c5LxDw6HzZz__DgZcLTSviYJk-KEhsB6qu0_NtsKHT0X-mRB-t8xGVq8wXOBC2RhNQx0HCxfRlbkkNWKubLItxHFw&c=cb_zPsGFxjPFgRYB98sS1M4zIrsugqL14QM3ZYM1LlLCRi0FsCtaag==&ch=o3Chv-OKFXQ3ruf1jvsl4Ogwv90X60eTMpyvktHKv-2fHcqVLSJfaQ==)

| Peter,
I will not stand idly by while the ATF treads on the rights of my constituents and the American people. Their unconstitutional reign against law-abiding gun owners must come to an end!
That's why I signed on to co-sponsor Marjorie Taylor Greene's bill to ELIMINATE the ATF and stop its authoritarian, bureaucratic abuse against law-abiding citizens.
