name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Peter, can I count on your support before midnight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
There are only a few hours left before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we still haven't hit our online fundraising goal. I wanted to take a moment to check in and share why it is so important that we hit these goals. Peter,

There are only a few hours left before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we still haven't hit our online fundraising goal. I wanted to take a moment to check in and share why it is so important that we hit these goals.

Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority and they're looking at critical swing districts to help them do it. As the first Democrat to ever represent Washington's 8th District, national Republicans have named my seat a top target to flip in the midterms.

On top of that, my first opponent entered the race last month and in one of his first interviews, he refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. He is already proving just how out of touch he is with our district and with reality.

After tonight's end-of-quarter deadline, our fundraising numbers will be made public once again. We know my opponent and national Republicans will look at what we raise to judge the strength of this grassroots team. That's why it's crucial to hit our goal. But with just a few hours left, we're still $2,745 short.

I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us close the gap before it's too late. Will you chip in before tonight's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to help protect our Democratic House majority and keep me in Congress fighting for you? >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-june2021-eoq](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698483/293477125/1851883060?gpsid=8_30_19577&refcode=em21_210630_eoq6_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_eoq6_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIzMGY0Yy1mZmQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwOftioi_TbwNu7Zgp1zO8Wf9NhlTYoLjliEBAS1q44=)**

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: In just a few short hours, the clock will strike midnight and our end of quarter push will come to an end. | | | | | | == | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this email. In just a few short hours, the clock will strike midnight and our end of quarter push will come to an end. We are still running behind our goal, which is why I'm reaching out to ask for your support. | | | == | | | == | Kat is dedicated to standing up for Florida's communities as a constitutional conservative and an America First patriot. She's working tirelessly to fight the Radical Left and make sure that America is safe and prosperous. Kat needs your support today to ensure that she shows the Radical Left that they don't stand a chance with our conservative movement. Now is our chance to secure America and hold the Radicals in Washington accountable to We the People. | | | == | For America, Derek Dufresne General Consultant | \-----Begin forwarded message----- From: Finance @ Team Cammack Date: Wednesday, June 30, 2021 at 9:00 AM Subject: End of Quarter Deadline | Friend, Today is the Second Quarter Deadline! At the end of the day, we will have to submit a report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), and we need your support to finish June strong. The Radical Left is raising millions of dollars to keep their power in our Nation's Capital, which means we have to match them and surpass them. | | | == | == | The socialists in Washington D.C. are attempting to spend trillions of dollars of taxpayer funds, and raise taxes on hard-working Americans. We need to hold the far-left accountable for this ridiculous attempt to socialize America and destroy our great nation. Whether it's defunding the police or opening our borders, the far-left have the wrong plan for America, which is why we have to stand strong against them. This upcoming fundraising deadline is our opportunity to send a message that conservatives will not accept this radicalism. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Finance @ Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Derek Kilmer Finance Team
subject: While Derek is protecting democracy, we're raising the resources to re-elect him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

While Derek is focused on strengthening our democracy, building our country back better, and protecting our environment, it's our job to ensure we're raising the resources we need to re-elect him next year.

That's why we set a goal of raising $5,000 before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline. To make sure we reach this goal, we've been going through our supporter record files to make sure we don't leave any stone unturned. Here's what we have for you:
**Quarter 2 Supporter Record for Peter

Donor Status: NON-DONOR
Suggested Donation: $5**

According to our records, you have not yet given to Derek's campaign this quarter. **[Make your first donation of $5, or whatever you can, right away to help us hit our most important goal yet.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OYghBx0gvswlRgIkJawc7KwBxWxy4P5av21h2oDtfkY=/dI7zDujaukyxKCiDx1hY2oC3XqrARcg91SBNtYs0O0k=?gpsid=50_115_19595&refcode=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/OYghBx0gvswlRgIkJawc7KwBxWxy4P5av21h2oDtfkY=/dI7zDujaukyxKCiDx1hY2oC3XqrARcg91SBNtYs0O0k=?gpsid=50_115_19595&refcode=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
_If you 've recently donated, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but don't worry -- we update these records regularly._
After tonight, we'll be filing our fundraising reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC), and then our numbers will become public. **If we fall short of our $5,000 goal, everyone will know, and you can bet Derek 's Republican challengers will take notice.**

Will you rush a donation before our FEC end-of-quarter deadline? **[Make your first donation of this quarter to help us reach our goal»](https://act.myngp.com/el/OYghBx0gvswlRgIkJawc7KwBxWxy4P5av21h2oDtfkY=/dI7zDujaukyxKCiDx1hY2oC3XqrARcg91SBNtYs0O0k=?gpsid=50_115_19595&refcode=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Derek Kilmer Finance Team

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/OYghBx0gvswlRgIkJawc7KwBxWxy4P5av21h2oDtfkY=/dI7zDujaukyxKCiDx1hY2oC3XqrARcg91SBNtYs0O0k=?gpsid=50_115_19595&refcode=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210630_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ndn__DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | Hey there — We just chatted with our finance director and wanted to send you a quick note to say = We're so close! We have to show the dark money groups backing our opponent that we have the resources and grassroots support to fight back against their attacks. If we don't, we could lose all we've fought to achieve. From Pierce to Grant, Wisconsin working families are too important for us to come up short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | = DEADLINE: 11:59PM TONIGHT EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com CONTRIBUTION:NOT YET = = | | | | | | There is no doubt, if we stand together, we'll make it clear that Team Kind is more than ready for the battle ahead. = We're going to get this done, and when we do, it will be thanks to you. For Wisconsin , Team Kind | | | | | | = = | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

Folks,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

**_Watch Announcement Video Below_**
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96f436fa738b4fb9baa550d536477915&_e=N6GDTDcJTuDAdsVBHv4QFbegaZXKjBP6PuEZt0KWV0ajpkv4BKN4HlYB2hgigiqfRtr53h6Q7yHxFLVZveyJq_j9boEF-r8b9O846xZ4OdmoJp2PbEuu2dBoYsjcw_kTG-onvOnPEvRZCoy0jMxWdIPNuktamoUf-aFp80Oe1ZAxc2CfI7TeMReBlCbLkOKUclc8BQ_Kdh3mMg1ElCY2O2Z1p7zNiFZufCZWVudx8XY2rWD1rf7vf6nEq8JMdIZqOxzIbSV2yBES4Td-dhTGrg50_Fv_yb5ci4W6OjkAILzUGe0C-N7btw39Up7DjL9MXdw3gZTtwbPPD2t73Uk0VrAg-KJDY1K2xXHSebFZWNfAuHElNjNvsiV3D6PS5cOMaWiQ9yzr-ODDKv9GlkbjTGqNI1H_VCMLRoU2qFEdd1JPzLpCOi7bJ1UG8RyrX4r1txdOAp-I9HL4A85hPYNMj9RmY7R202x7q0tUtdc1ujbuhF9BiAG2tMGOEdJJo76-)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I’ve done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I’m asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96f436fa738b4fb9baa550d536477915&_e=N6GDTDcJTuDAdsVBHv4QFbegaZXKjBP6PuEZt0KWV0ajpkv4BKN4HlYB2hgigiqfRtr53h6Q7yHxFLVZveyJq_j9boEF-r8b9O846xZ4OdmoJp2PbEuu2dBoYsjcw_kTG-onvOnPEvRZCoy0jMxWdIPNuktamoUf-aFp80Oe1ZAxc2CfI7TeMReBlCbLkOKUclc8BQ_Kdh3mMg1ElCY2O2Z1p7zNiFZufCZWVudx8XY2rWD1rf7vf6nEq8JMdIZqOxzIbSV2yBES4Td-dhTGrg50_Fv_yb5ci4W6OjkAILxoqrdHwMJxs4f0G687mPm6p2WboAlw_iMOJPf73_BUwcKA7KKJk8IlShDf6fq7aD5cTYIxw1dGj62wldozgFhhMP7qvxFmHiUgUhrisz_24ZShRO0NBMArSCZfgjX0YLgBAHFs9I48x4SOTna2RMl70hQI70B2jdaRrM1sQirQ6nHcfIpp2zh3M8WbzfxBTSV5Joq-cXjD3p1mLEjimWKO)_**

I’m looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn’t what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that’s for certain!**

I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it’ll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country.**

clean_body: Please Open | Folks, I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022. Watch Announcement Video Below - Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I’ve done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son. | I’m looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.What you hear in town isn’t what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that’s for certain! I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats. Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it’ll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country. Thank you and God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

subject: I'll be straight-up with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| |
---
I'll be straight-up with you, friend: I didn't want to send this email, but with only hours until our huge end-of-quarter deadline, we're still coming up $2,046 short of our goal, and I need your help to close that gap as soon as possible. **This is the last call, friend: [Can you chip in – $5 or even $10 – right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698923/293479750/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)**
Our extremist Republican opponents aren't going to have this problem – they can count on their shady GOP megadonors shelling out millions to keep Arizona red. Their party will spend whatever it takes to keep their grip on power – all so they can push their conspiracy theories and bring Trumpism roaring back to life.
I'm running because I believe Arizonans deserve a governor who will build a state that works for _all_ people. But I can't win this race without your support, especially not when Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is already calling it a toss-up.
**[So with the biggest deadline yet of this campaign just hours away, I'm asking you personally: Can you rush a donation right now to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal before midnight so we can win this race, defeat GOP extremism and build a state that works for all of us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698924/293479751/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)**
Thank you,

Marco
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Marco Lopez**
Date: Mon, June 28, 2021
Subject: I have to ask
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698925/293479752/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to chip in to help us hit our $25,000 end-of-quarter goal and power the campaign that's going to flip Arizona blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my story is classically Arizonan: My parents taught me to work hard and dream big, and if I did that, anything was possible.

Throughout my life, that promise held true for me – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others, too. I've focused on bringing people together to collaborate for the common good, solving big problems everywhere from my hometown, where I served as mayor, to the Obama administration.
But not everyone wants to solve problems. From passing voter suppression bills to conducting corrupt election audits, failed Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state. **I'm running for governor to put an end to GOP corruption and build a state that works for _all_ our people, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you want a governor who will truly fight for you, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to help us reach our must-hit end-of-quarter goal before the deadline? Every dollar will fuel our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state – and this goal is our most important yet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698926/293479753/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)**
Donating to our campaign is about more than just the amount – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

I know we can power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – we delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but _still_ have a Republican governor. **And now, Arizona Republicans are pushing a sham election audit designed to keep Democrats from EVER winning another election. But we don't have to sit by and watch it happen.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up –_ which means we have a real chance at flipping Arizona blue. The snag is, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
To flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make progress for all our people, I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical end-of-quarter deadline – to power our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698927/293479754/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698928/293479755/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698929/293479756/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31698931/293479758/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODU3YmQwMC0wMGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxy6uiOcUTpPcrwOL4g2Zzm9sBmfvTVyDDSbN6eZuyI=)

clean_body: Hey, it’s Nick. Our fundraising deadline is only a few hours away, so I thought I’d forward Joe’s email and make sure you saw it. This fight is such an important one, Friend -- because it’s our communities, our freedoms, our children on the line. We rely on grassroots supporters, which is why I’m asking you personally if you’ll donate , , maybe even to our Freitas Freedom Fund. When I say every penny counts, I mean it. Thank you for your support, Nick Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Joe, Team Freitas, me <team@nickforva.com> Date: Tues, Jun 29, 2021 at 1:00 PM Subject: our upcoming deadline Our fundraising deadline for the second quarter of the year is TOMORROW , Friend. You know no one will fight for the Commonwealth of Virginia like Nick will. He’s a proven fighter with a lifetime of service on his résumé, but as the 2020 election proved, he’s still an underdog. This is why I’m reaching out to you about our FREITAS FREEDOM FUND. Nick fought hard for our freedoms and will continue fighting the radical Richmond Democrats, and he needs YOUR help. I’ve known Nick for a few years now, and believe me when I say there’s no one better equipped to fight for Virginia than him. If you want to see change in Richmond and believe Nick can and will fight for our freedoms, Thank you, Joe Team Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

We need to send a message to the Dems that conservatives will N | Fellow Conservative, I know you’re getting a lot of emails today, but I just reviewed our numbers, and this can’t wait. This quarter is over in less than 12 hours and we’re so close to hitting our goal. The best way to do that is by putting up jaw-dropping numbers this quarter and prove that Republicans are a united front. | | | ---|---|--- | - | Thanks, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. body:
Which I've never done before. Would you spare a moment to watch it and let me know if you can help out? When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground._And the scariest part of all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.

I recorded a brief video for you to watch, as today marks the first FEC mandated quarterly fundraising deadline since I entered the Senate race last month. Would you please spare a moment to watch? **

[](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9iskXEUmXQue3Ehvza4V0q7gQI76Z23O2zJucV5R_8fImglaa9c7nzndRUrOO4qy7o4KVJcmH-fjcBTgyeOxHXVJmH_LqHTf_vbQaAuiXA2JOTi9mPktP8EKqh33oUMXtUoBjMKdP2hs0O2QDQnKS-LkvyzcAguaV5ENge6Ha4Zg50SyYDN5hNbeJbEicBCdutYS8VdoQ9jRzz6BS4W6Oqog%3D%3D)
[ PLEASE WATCH BEFORE 11:59PM »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9imQhxIy5Niv6T9xTKarha2JoY-P27SpvsOENeFqhmS2rGXFfg2mD_rVZp5dRIB149heRZf58cxjlqWImZqWQgqlX4f5cJTT8oRvtNTj-ZWuHD9Fj4Bu38omK9u2Czb_XujE5ich1qvwW6ogBg1sDcuKYQ0yxe2c9vGQNVczxJtKSmwKt4ETPCX1ZklN7PTv1j5FjjF9Xnk0Z5iISYXnTO_A%3D%3D)
Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

I am asking you to watch the video I recorded (**[and linked to this email](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9iepCzIFEg43fzyVjsI0oD1P4QRsTECifTktiiBbQR12hyHAYFTnXxRAnFta3aKMtw-OcqFImBT12eLJSfRalvsf1Vfg3aItFXQkQ0ws2CuST5fn1ZPTvMiUby_MgcuMvanU2lr5UlrQTUU_akgVskSi7akVsu36AtsmCy7Eb3sxLDgKwvDNKUo8mkBwWURXsuGC1ZvrwNUCXlrY-A6TZQhg%3D%3D))** because in the month since I've launched my campaign I've become the focus of attacks from my opponents, the Left, and the mainstream media who don't think I'm serious about my candidacy. **[The first big deadline of this race occurs at midnight tonight with the FEC second quarter fundraising deadline. We're still short $5,550 from hitting our goal, and I'm hubmly asking for your immediate help](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9ij3gcyW0K7_mUa8_K6oxfvLRBTFfjt0N3XokQJfuRW2-abNnjCv5UUamBNaSjwUn8O2VebDSSVrEvSo1AiemcyVYxuQszVlHyJvUJhw1emyWSKkaHLZHGLJ5F3UX6sS5WgE7HUac2hTND5wXxGu4aRvgbU8Q2sr7JN4Iii-BZQ9IotwJgXR8t-kkL2jCJEyHnEKVwIwyUJlXk-NqdwRRN-Q%3D%3D)**.

[ Please watch before 11:59pm tonight »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9ine7mnVy-KTBxeM7fJ4UdgXb5hRG2Dln_ncJw5lWrg0MzuWHu1aWQDHEOtPN79B90RDu-fD3BCZjvA5_ykQrFCmjuBUGdYa8YIzDPv1ZI974h8KXoSK-fxvsfRsg0o_SIfZnF7Zw6LjSaqGSjeWAHk-V9GZA0VzeY52uNABGMeJPzWNVkCDs_QK-M-nvBOG_KmTNpwojVEJiKt47FfPwQWA%3D%3D)
**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9irS0yZZRv68zjS8B3C0QyCVMj1O0A-MPXv1th6y8micj5bWwfyncqw_bO_5H8BJ3cE4nswl6guUsBmyuMwHIRwLET_SkIZYqNaPgiWqXi8yVMKp7pP8NOxFOLNGWbbkw7vtGUuaznJMxErd7s0tN6woQ1rv8mvAiOSU3ns9ZyHvxCpWcfIZDj95Rq28acJo_4C1PJFQ0O0kq2q-abux79jA%3D%3D)**.

**Here is my ask of you today:** Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, **[will you chip-in whatever you can afford today to help me reach our fundraising goal for the second fundraising quarter? Time is of the essence - we only have until midnight tonight to reach our goal!](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9i7ea_Xjdju-GlvXTBo3jNhgl9nfNHxSYdn_DDDkk9T43-P275pkp4tML5Y8CkTn-x5TEjs2kHkv09HrD9gQGFt807cIq1_dwUG5b1jQb6YQJXyI999KKXDeqeyO-UyYJGyHel8BjHPM_M9zC33-Y0c9bJYHbpjqpYv8jUMVUYy4J_WFIG-1-jrRvGFKiIKetVIYj07bqFDRH9RM2YXzNtfA%3D%3D)**

You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you.

**And I will always defend our police.**

**[I hope you’ll do me the honor of supporting my candidacy for U.S. Senate today, and chipping-in a few dollars if you can](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=7a1014aa0cb141b194923bf17e599572&_e=UZPrUyJ5j6cnxd9OkkZ8--6yoF9zKK7GoE6yhHpuP31BARpIFOstOUqdtC8HA1s9ZZcQDZFHwfGa4cJFL7N5aPPqnIqUZtzs9X4TPJz-cgz1K_pzeeWloCUaoqQ9BycjDRVz3F_ACvp9j6OzlmAs1IUQrLG23u__u0qUlHQDIYmy3lu8RuofmrlKlBGZYCtjf2CRJ4ZHvsK74jH5bbQLoEvqj1TRHXoS9mIElIlsmIU-ZHhFx2ZD083OToOkyI9ijeBbVVDimquWBDfzuYih0YkYUdBf2bhyEW6BROx77Icue7WwulApHhdyb1AqnBOMHLTPn5T_rzcIzbD1OLNH5XcXwK8OMYYojfF1fwnLGPInEZY-qwD8Lwqrj9qP5YSAjVeb11VXLYe8yDFQPY90Qpm-BrBwHJz76njh91l0ObxuEvLSxcyEyhIsuxV2JUKcZr_9O1cK0Mwedyez0ht_VA%3D%3D)**.

Mark McCloskey

clean_body: Which I've never done before. Would you spare a moment to watch it and let me know if you can help out? When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground.And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. I recorded a brief video for you to watch, as today marks the first FEC mandated quarterly fundraising deadline since I entered the Senate race last month. Would you please spare a moment to watch? Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. I am asking you to watch the video I recorded () because in the month since I've launched my campaign I've become the focus of attacks from my opponents, the Left, and the mainstream media who don't think I'm serious about my candidacy. . Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. . For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: This is not enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | **First:** We raised alarms last month about the Arizona GOP's sham-audit and what it would mean for our nationwide fight for voting rights. **Then:** Merrick Garland announced that the DOJ's Civil Rights Division would be investigating the audit for possible violations of federal law. **Now:** Maricopa County officials are being forced to throw away millions of dollars of voting equipment because it was turned over to a Republican-led third party, and there are legitimate concerns that the machines were tampered with. **Make no mistake, Peter, we have won important victories in the defense of elections in Arizona, but none of them will be enough to protect the future of our republic.** Republicans are waging an all out assault on free and fair elections across the country, and the Arizona audit was just the first assault. That's why it's critical that Congress pass meaningful voting rights legislation to protect our democracy. We cannot allow the GOP to continue to erode our democracy, but with Democrats in Congress not moving fast enough, it's up to stalwart Democrats like you to speak up and demand our elections be secured. **We need to hear from 200 more Democrats to demand Congress take action:** **Do you demand that Congress defends our elections against GOP attacks?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31699821/293488958/-1511053674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZmE4MDdlLTAzZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J_ZO2pIklN-15NyctLvioukEmBgak44bOchTZ-8uqzM=&emci=ecd1d844-c6d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6bfa807e-03da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31699822/293488959/-1511053674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZmE4MDdlLTAzZGEtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J_ZO2pIklN-15NyctLvioukEmBgak44bOchTZ-8uqzM=&emci=ecd1d844-c6d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6bfa807e-03da-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

subject: final countdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important, but we need to finish this quarter off strong to make sure we have the resources to beat Ron Johnson and the corporate PACs that are backing him.

Peter, we’re just a few hours away from our end-of-quarter deadline, and I wanted to send over a quick note to you before midnight tonight.

We’re still $2,220 short of where we need to be, and I’m counting on you to help us close this gap.

I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important, but we need to finish this quarter off strong to make sure we have the resources to beat Ron Johnson and the corporate PACs that are backing him.

**Please, use this link to give $5 or whatever you can before midnight tonight:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/alexpersonaljune_2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31700117/293492808/268538403?refcode=EM_FR_210630EOQ11_2021EOQ2_AL_FULL_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTMzZDNiZi0wNGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKUBpg81AP1Tak2lmcb7u22R8PZGMc9JPuUWiwKM7m8=)**

Tomorrow morning we begin the third quarter of the year, and I’ll have to sit with my team to go over our budget. Here are some things that I want to make sure we have enough money for:
* Canvassing supplies
* Flyers and mailers
* Building a field team
* Running ads online and on TV

To put it bluntly, we need to have the resources to take on Ron Johnson, but right now, we’re behind.

I’m asking one last time before the end of the quarter if you will chip in $5 or more. We’re just $2,220 short, and anything you give will go a long way >>

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/alexpersonaljune_2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31700118/293492809/268538403?refcode=EM_FR_210630EOQ11_2021EOQ2_AL_FULL_4_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTMzZDNiZi0wNGRhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKUBpg81AP1Tak2lmcb7u22R8PZGMc9JPuUWiwKM7m8=)**

Thank you for everything,

Alex

Milwaukee, WI 53203

clean_body: this is TERRIBLE | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We emailed yesterday asking for your help. | ** | | | | Tonight is Dr. Ruiz’s PUBLIC Fundraising Deadline. If he falls short, Republicans will think he’s an easy target. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need Dr. Ruiz fighting alongside them in Congress. But if more good Democrats don’t chip in before midnight, his campaign could be in trouble. | | | | | | Thank you. \-- Ruiz HQ | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Kelly has tasked us with making sure we have the necessary resources to win against Lisa Murkowski and her everlasting bankroll from Washington D.C. We can’t forget it was the same Murkowski that voted to IMPEACH President Trump and sideline our America First Conservative Values! I know we can keep up with her this End-of-Quarter because we have YOU on our team! When we look back at today and see how strong our movement is against Lisa Murkowski, we will know it's because of strong supporters like you who want to see our Conservative America First values brought to the Senate! But we can’t do it without your Grassroots support! Thank you, Team Kelly Finance Team P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. on our first deadline of the general election.

#

Friends, we are going to be upfront with our ask — we are emailing for $5.
[**Click here if you don’t have time to read anymore but still want to chip in $5 to help us pass universal background checks >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210630-2-15&t=1&refcode2=300_3935704_c7PRH4&akid=300%2E3935704%2Ec7PRH4)
Our 25,000 contribution goal for our June FEC deadline ends tonight at midnight, and we only have a few hours left to gather as many donations as we can.
$5 might not seem like a lot. But when you chip in $5, and the next person reading this email chips in $5 too, it gives us the resources to hit our goal and do our part. So before we say anymore we have to ask:

body:
Friend—

I know it’s late, and I promise this is the last time we’ll ask.

Stefanie just called me with an update on our midnight deadline. We’re just $2,436 short.

Thanks to your support, we’ve had an outstanding month already, but we need your help to cross the finish line. Please click here to chip in now if you haven’t already. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enfeom?refcode=wed2]

I can’t thank you enough for believing in this movement. Together, we’re going to break Florida’s rigged, corrupt system and try something new.

With Gratitude,
Nikki

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Will you be one of the people we need from your area right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In less than 6 hours we’ll hit our midnight deadline, and we are still 8,530 contributions away from our goal.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210630-2257-header&t=1&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)
We’re down to the wire.
In less than 6 hours we’ll hit our midnight deadline, and we are still 8,530 contributions away from our 106,617 contributions goal. We’re so close to this target. We just need a strong response to this email.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210630-2?refcode=em20210630-2257-P&t=2&refcode2=2257_2526796_w9NYv-&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)
We’ve done the math — if we can get three contributions to this email from your community, we’ll be on track to meet our goal by midnight.
Each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your community and across the country.
[With less than 6 hours left before the end of the quarter, can you be one of the three people we need from your area to make a contribution right now to get us to our goal and power our movement to lift up working families?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210630-2?refcode=em20210630-2257-P&t=21&refcode2=2257_2526796_w9NYv-&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210630-2?refcode=em20210630-2257-P&t=22&refcode2=2257_2526796_w9NYv-&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)**
With working families struggling and our planet under threat, we can’t just wait around for progressive change. It’s time for us to mobilize.
Our campaign is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, minimize inequality, and reverse the effects of climate change.
The time for half measures is over. We need bold solutions that are big enough to match the crises we face. **And with your support, Alexandria won’t stop fighting for those bold solutions.**
[Three contributions from your area before the midnight deadline will guarantee we hit this goal and power our campaign forward. So, please — if you’re able — will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal before our midnight deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210630-2?refcode=em20210630-2257-P&t=23&refcode2=2257_2526796_w9NYv-&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210630-2?refcode=em20210630-2257-P&t=24&refcode2=2257_2526796_w9NYv-&akid=2257%2E2526796%2Ew9NYv-)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. clean_body: In less than 6 hours we’ll hit our midnight deadline, and we are still 8,530 contributions away from our goal. - We’re down to the wire. In less than 6 hours we’ll hit our midnight deadline, and we are still 8,530 contributions away from our 106,617 contributions goal. We’re so close to this target. We just need a strong response to this email. - We’ve done the math — if we can get three contributions to this email from your community, we’ll be on track to meet our goal by midnight. Each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your community and across the country. - - With working families struggling and our planet under threat, we can’t just wait around for progressive change. It’s time for us to mobilize. Our campaign is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, minimize inequality, and reverse the effects of climate change. The time for half measures is over. We need bold solutions that are big enough to match the crises we face. And with your support, Alexandria won’t stop fighting for those bold solutions. - Thank you for making all of this possible. Team AOC - - | - | - Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Mark, Gabby, and Scott have reached out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ A Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC dropped a $1 MILLION ad buy attacking Mark**
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210630-2-15&t=1&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
Friends —
On Monday, Mark reached out himself about how important hitting our 100,000 contribution goal is.
Then yesterday, Mark’s wife and former Congresswoman, Gabby Giffords, reached out again to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short after a Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC dropped a $1 MILLION ad attacking Mark this week.
And this morning, Mark’s twin brother, Scott, reached out again to hammer home the importance of hitting this goal. He doesn’t reach out often so you know this is serious.
**So you’ve heard from Mark, Gabby, and Scott personally and they all know what’s on the line in the next few hours. So before time runs out, we have to humbly ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210630-2-15&t=2&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=15&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=16&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=17&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=18&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=19&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210630-2-15&t=20&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever Mitch McConnell and his allies decide to throw at us next as we gear up to run again in 2022.
Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210630-2-15&t=21&refcode2=897_6688874_WKZStt&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=22&akid=897%2E6688874%2EWKZStt).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: U.S. Spends $80 Mil to Train Minorities to Collect Health Data with Race, Socioeconomic Inequities
body:
The U.S. government is spending $80 million to train thousands of minorities in public health technology and improve health data collection involving race and ethnicity.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | June 30, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25245&F=H&)
---
# [U.S. Spends $80 Mil to Train Minorities to Collect Health Data with Race, Socioeconomic Inequities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25245&F=H&)
The U.S. government is spending $80 million to train thousands of minorities in public health technology and improve health data collection involving race and ethnicity. It is part of the Biden administration’s efforts to “root out pervasive health and socioeconomic inequities” in the nation’s healthcare system, according to an announcement issued this month by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). “Ensuring that diverse representation is better reflected all throughout our health care system is priority for the Biden-Harris administration,” said HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra, a former California attorney general who served a dozen terms in the U.S. House of Representatives. “With this funding, we will be able to train and create new opportunities for thousands of minorities long underrepresented in our public health informatics and technology fields.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25245&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Schools’ critical race theory plans could violate the Constitution, state laws, says watchdog group ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25246&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY3J0LWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmFsLXZpb2xhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYzMDIyMTMxMQ==) The Washington Times In Massachusetts, the Wellesley Public Schools system was already reeling under controversy for a series of events tied to “diversity, equity and inclusion” when a conservative watchdog group announced it had obtained records showing that schools use “affinity spaces that divide students and staff based on race.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25246&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY3J0LWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmFsLXZpb2xhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYzMDIyMTMxMQ==)
---

### [Virginia Gives Illegal Immigrants In-State Tuition at Public Colleges, Aid for Private Universities ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25212&F=H&) Judicial Watch Starting this fall Virginia will offer illegal immigrants discounted in-state tuition at taxpayer-funded colleges as well as financial aid to attend private universities. This month the state’s governor, Ralph Northam, signed the new law during a heavily publicized visit to Marymount University, a private Arlington college with an enrollment of about 3,200. “These students have grown up in our communities across Virginia,” the Democrat lawmaker said during the signing. “They’ve attended the same schools as their classmates and neighbors, they have taken the same tests, they have played on the same teams, eaten in the same lunch rooms and even gone to the same dances. They are valued members of our communities, and they are Virginians in every sense of the word except for immigration status – something that was chosen for them, not by them, by families just wanting a better life for their children.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56069&L=25212&F=H&)

clean_body: The U.S. government is spending $80 million to train thousands of minorities in public health technology and improve health data collection involving race and ethnicity. | | | Because no one is above the law! | June 30, 2021 ---|---|--- | | The U.S. government is spending $80 million to train thousands of minorities in public health technology and improve health data collection involving race and ethnicity. It is part of the Biden administration’s efforts to “root out pervasive health and socioeconomic inequities” in the nation’s healthcare system, according to an announcement issued this month by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). “Ensuring that diverse representation is better reflected all throughout our health care system is priority for the Biden-Harris administration,” said HHS Secretary Xavier Becerra, a former California attorney general who served a dozen terms in the U.S. House of Representatives. “With this funding, we will be able to train and create new opportunities for thousands of minorities long underrepresented in our public health informatics and technology fields.” | | | == The Washington Times In Massachusetts, the Wellesley Public Schools system was already reeling under controversy for a series of events tied to “diversity, equity and inclusion” when a conservative watchdog group announced it had obtained records showing that schools use “affinity spaces that divide students and staff based on race.” == = Judicial Watch The FOIA request was prompted by the April 15 congressional testimony of Dr. Rochelle Walensky, director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and the administrator of the Agency for Toxic Substances and Disease Registry. In her testimony, Dr. Walensky said: “The CDC is providing technical assistance to the Office of Refugee Resettlement for the people who are leaving the DHS [Department of Homeland Security] and Customs and Border Protection.” = Judicial Watch Starting this fall Virginia will offer illegal immigrants discounted in-state tuition at taxpayer-funded colleges as well as financial aid to attend private universities. This month the state’s governor, Ralph Northam, signed the new law during a heavily publicized visit to Marymount University, a private Arlington college with an enrollment of about 3,200. “These students have grown up in our communities across Virginia,” the Democrat lawmaker said during the signing. “They’ve attended the same schools as their classmates and neighbors, they have taken the same tests, they have played on the same teams, eaten in the same lunch rooms and even gone to the same dances. They are valued members of our communities, and they are Virginians in every sense of the word except for immigration status – something that was chosen for them, not by them, by families just wanting a better life for their children.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

name: Erica Smith
subject: Your very last chance to directly impact our Q2 fundraising success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m coming directly to you.
#
Hi, it’s Erica. This email is pretty urgent, so I hope you’ll read it all the way through.
In just a few hours, the books will close on our Q2 fundraising. Then I’ll be required by law to report how much money our campaign raised to the FEC. In other words, tonight is your _very last chance_ to directly impact the Q2 fundraising success of our unapologetic North Carolina campaign.
**And because we’re a mere six (6!!!) contributions away from the original goal we set last week, your first-ever donation tonight could be the one that puts us over the top.**
Since you haven’t donated to our campaign yet, I hope it’s okay that I’m coming directly to you:
[**_Can you please make a donation of any amount before our May fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Let’s show the establishment that our inclusive, moral movement has what it takes to win this primary._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3752?refcode=em20210630-228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3752?refcode=em20210630-228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3752?refcode=em20210630-228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)
P.S. If you make a donation of ANY amount to this email before 8:00 PM ET, I’ll give you a phone call on Facebook Live later tonight between 8:00 PM — 9:30 PM ET.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210630-228-footer&t=22&refcode2=228_3698_g1V2Ka&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=228%2E3698%2Eg1V2Ka)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Greg Abbott (iPhone)
subject: I can’t believe I’m writing this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
I can’t believe I’m writing this, but with just HOURS to go until our MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE EVER, I’m afraid to tell you that we’re STILL SHORT

name: John Fetterman
subject: I noticed that you haven't yet made a donation to our campaign to help reach our $100,000 goal before June 30.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is your last chance to get a phone call from me for a while.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21657?refcode=em20210630-1892&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)
^^^ We’re _soooooo_ close to reaching our big goal of raising $100,000 before the end-of-quarter-deadline at midnight. Like really, really close. 😬
I noticed that you haven't yet made a donation to help reach our goal before June 30. Remember, I am required by federal law to report how much we’ve raised. So I’ll just be upfront with you as I humbly ask for the very last time this month...
**Could you please make a donation of *any* amount to our campaign right now? I’m adding a few more names to my list of online donors to call, and if you donate $27, $10, or even $5 before midnight, Peter Willis could be on that list.**
To donate, feel free to use this personalized link, or you can just click the button below: **[ _https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20210630-3?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com_](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21657?refcode=em20210630-1892&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)**
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21657?refcode=em20210630-1892&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)**
Not only is this your last chance to get a phone call from me + Gisele for a while — it’s your last chance to make a donation during our first full FEC quarter since I officially announced that I was running for Senate.
Since launching our campaign, hundreds of thousands of people have made their stake in democracy by donating to our campaign. What we’re building here is *special* and it’s gonna be BIG. The reason I know we have what it takes to win is because of people like you who read my emails and donate.
Thank you so much for all you do. Hoping you believe in me as much as I believe in our bold + common-sense campaign.
— John
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21657?refcode=em20210630-1892&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210630-1892-footer&t=5&refcode2=1892_434096_IIUGJI&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1892%2E434096%2EIIUGJI)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Final Notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
Midnight is approaching

[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/yMeccgFzWvxjnhDS4ZI_CQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRiv4b5P0UgMTgyMGU1MGQyZjFhYTNmNGQ0NGQ2ZTI0MGQzYzM1OGJEQGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8wNjMwZGVhZGxpbmUtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg2fkB3WDtyACZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Peter,
I promise, this is the last email you’ll receive from me today. However, with our major midnight deadline just hours away, I need every grassroots conservative who can, [**_to please step up and contribute $10, $25, $100, or whatever you can afford._**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/yMeccgFzWvxjnhDS4ZI_CQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRiv4b5P0UgMTgyMGU1MGQyZjFhYTNmNGQ0NGQ2ZTI0MGQzYzM1OGJEQGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8wNjMwZGVhZGxpbmUtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg2fkB3WDtyACZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
My campaigns have always been funded by grassroots donors, and now that I’m being targeted by Nancy Pelosi and the radical Democrat money machine, our [**_grassroots army of Texas patriots is more important than ever. Will you help out with a contribution BEFORE MIDNIGHT?_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/yMeccgFzWvxjnhDS4ZI_CQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRiv4b5P0UgMTgyMGU1MGQyZjFhYTNmNGQ0NGQ2ZTI0MGQzYzM1OGJEQGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8wNjMwZGVhZGxpbmUtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg2fkB3WDtyACZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
I’m fighting hard for you and our shared conservative values, and I’m eager to continue fighting on your behalf. We must stop the Democrats! Their agenda of open borders, radical indoctrination, defunding the police, gutting our military, and taxing us to death is destroying our country.
**The woke D.C. Democrats are literally tearing our country apart, and it is up to us to stop them. The stakes could not be higher! **[**_You can make a difference. Will you join me in this fight?_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/yMeccgFzWvxjnhDS4ZI_CQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRiv4b5P0UgMTgyMGU1MGQyZjFhYTNmNGQ0NGQ2ZTI0MGQzYzM1OGJEQGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy8wNjMwZGVhZGxpbmUtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg2fkB3WDtyACZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Thank you for your support!

For Texas,
Rep. Pat Fallon (TX-04)
You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can [unsubscribe](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/VOFZQhXkQwskNq4Ljt1Gdw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRiv4b5P4QWAWh0dHBzOi8vYXJib3Jlc2NlbnMuZW9tYWlsNi5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU_~) at any time.

body:
| | | Carole King emailed.

Sean Patrick Maloney emailed.
Sharice Davids emailed.
Angie Craig emailed.
_And now we 're emailing -- again._

**[These top Democrats have all reached out because our MOST IMPORTANT deadline so far this year is just five hours away!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)**
| [MID YEAR DEADLINE: TONIGHT, 11:59 PM
SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $1_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Listen:** House Republicans are dead set on DEFEATING our Democrats across the country and DESTROYING our Majority.**

And they now have a RECORD-BREAKING **$42 million** in the bank to do just that.

So if we want to put up our best fight to defend our House Majority and safeguard our progress, we're going to need your support like never before.

**[That's why we're calling on 2,OOO grassroots Democrats to rush in $1 before our Mid Year Deadline hits in just five hours.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**

Can we count on you to be one of them? Our top Democrats are counting on you.

So if we want to put up our best fight to defend our House Majority and safeguard our progress, we're going to need your support like never before. Can we count on you to be one of them? Our top Democrats are counting on you. | | | | | | Thank you, Democratic HQ Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
